STDM_0100001_0010.Text: If only I hadn't picked up that finger back then... If only I hadn't eaten it...!

STDM_0100001_0020.Text: You're a strong kid, so try to help others.

STDM_0100001_0040.Text: Sorry for the wait, Yuji! Huh? What's wrong?

STDM_0100001_0060.Text: Before, I was too weak, and I couldn't save anybody. Worse, I nearly got Fushiguro killed.

STDM_0100001_0070.Text: Make me strong. Make me into the strongest!

STDM_0100001_0080.Text: I like your enthusiasm! Let's get on with your special training.

STDM_0100003_0085.Text: Against that Special Grade, I got it to work somehow.

STDM_0100003_0090.Text:
Because it requires negative emotions. In the fight that 
you're recalling, you were probably brimming with fear and with anger.

STDM_0100003_0100.Text: All students are trained to produce Cursed Energy using even the faintest sparks of emotion.

STDM_0100003_0110.Text: And they are training ways to avoid wasting their Cursed Energy when their emotions are flaring up as well.

STDM_0100003_0120.Text: I've got some work to do before I can face them!

STDM_0100101_0010.Text: June 2018. Sugisawa Municipal High School #3, Sendai City, Miyagi Prefecture.

STDM_0100101_0020.Text: High school first-year Yuji Itadori swallowed a Cursed Object, Ryomen Sukuna's finger, incarnating Sukuna. Per Jujutsu Regulations, Itadori must be executed.

STDM_0100101_0030.Text: Special Grade Jujutsu Sorcerer Satoru Gojo held Itadori in his custody and informed him of his sentence.

STDM_0100101_0040.Text: A few days before the secret execution was decided...

STDM_0100101_0050.Text: Jujutsu High first-year student Megumi Fushiguro was sent to Itadori's high school to retrieve a Special Grade Cursed Object—Ryomen Sukuna's finger.

STDM_0100101_0060.Text: Yuji Itadori, a non-Sorcerer suspected of being in possession of the Special Grade Cursed Object, came into contact with Fushiguro.

STDM_0100101_0070.Text: Fushiguro learned that students at Sugisawa Municipal High School #3 were planning to open the Cursed Object's seal that night, so he headed to the scene.

STDM_0100101_0080.Text: By the time Fushiguro arrived, the seal had already been opened, and a Cursed Spirit was trying to absorb the Cursed Object.

STDM_0100101_0085.Text: Yuji Itadori burst in and managed to retrieve the Cursed Object.

STDM_0100101_0090.Text: However, Megumi Fushiguro was injured by the Cursed Spirit's attacks.

STDM_0100101_0095.Text: Yuji Itadori launched into battle with the Cursed Spirit.

STDM_0100102_0100.Text: Only a Curse can beat a Curse! You cannot defeat this!

STDM_0100102_0110.Text: Is that your idea of a pep talk?! At this rate, we're both gonna die!

STDM_0100102_0120.Text: If I quit now, I'll be having this nightmare for weeks.

STDM_0100102_0130.Text: Besides, I know what I have to do.

STDM_0100102_0140.Text: I'm living with a rotten Curse of my own already!

STDM_0100103_0150.Text: I just need to have my own Cursed Energy, don't I?

STDM_0100103_0160.Text: Don't do it... Don't do it!

STDM_0100103_0180.Text: Ah, I knew it! The light feels best in the flesh.

STDM_0100103_0190.Text: What a wonderful era to be reawakened! Women and children are crawling everywhere like maggots!

STDM_0100103_0220.Text: What do you think you're doing with my body? Give it back.

STDM_0100103_0230.Text: Hey, wait. How are you doing that?

STDM_0100103_0250.Text:
Stay right where you are.
You're no longer human.

STDM_0100103_0270.Text: Under Jujutsu Regulation, Yuji Itadori, by law I will now exorcise you as a Curse.

STDM_0100201_0010.Text: Satoru Gojo arrives at Sugisawa Municipal High School #3.

STDM_0100201_0015.Text: Hearing that Itadori ate Sukuna's finger, Gojo investigates whether Ryomen Sukuna's soul is living inside Itadori's body alongside his own.

STDM_0100201_0020.Text: He concludes that the King of Curses, Special Grade Curse Ryomen Sukuna, has been incarnated.

STDM_0100201_0030.Text: Can you swap with Sukuna at will?

STDM_0100201_0060.Text: Oh, mm-hmm. Yeah, I think I can do that.

STDM_0100201_0070.Text: Okay. Give us 10 seconds and change right back into yourself.

STDM_0100201_0090.Text: Nah, don't worry. I'm way too strong for him.

STDM_0100202_0093.Text: I think I'll show off a little.

STDM_0100202_0097.Text: I'm about to kill you just for the hell of it.

STDM_0100202_0100.Text: For crying out loud. You Jujutsu Sorcerers are always such a pain in the ass in any era.

STDM_0100202_0110.Text: Seven, eight, nine... And that should do it.

STDM_0100203_0130.Text: Oh, about that. So, you really can control that guy.

STDM_0100203_0140.Text: He's kind of annoying though, to tell the truth. And I keep hearing his voice.

STDM_0100203_0150.Text: It's a miracle that's all he's doing to you.

STDM_0100203_0160.Text: What did you do to him?

STDM_0100203_0180.Text: If he isn't possessed by Sukuna when he wakes up, then he might have potential as a vessel.

STDM_0100203_0190.Text: Now, I have a question for you. What do you think we should do with him?

STDM_0100203_0200.Text: Hm... Well, even if he is a vessel, Jujutsu Regulations demand Itadori be executed.

STDM_0100203_0210.Text: However, I don't want him to die.

STDM_0100203_0220.Text: A request from a precious student? Leave it to me.

STDM_0100203_0230.Text: But the end result is still your execution.

STDM_0100203_0240.Text: Huh? Your recap doesn't match with the current events.

STDM_0100301_0010.Text: You still have to die, but I got your sentence suspended.

STDM_0100301_0020.Text: I'll just explain from the top.

STDM_0100301_0030.Text: This is the same kind of thing as the Cursed Object you ate.

STDM_0100301_0040.Text:
There are twenty of these in total. 
We possess six of them.

STDM_0100301_0050.Text: We can't destroy them. The Curse is that powerful.

STDM_0100301_0070.Text: When you die, the Sukuna inside you will die as well.

STDM_0100301_0080.Text: So, here's what I proposed to them.

STDM_0100301_0090.Text: Since they've already decided to execute you, why not wait until after you've absorbed all of Sukuna to do it?

STDM_0100301_0100.Text: So now, you have two options before you.

STDM_0100301_0110.Text: You can die, here and now. Or gather all the parts of Sukuna, absorb them, and then die.

STDM_0100301_0120.Text: You're a strong kid, so try to help others.

STDM_0100301_0130.Text: When you die, you should be surrounded by people.

STDM_0100301_0150.Text: My grandpa. Although he was more like a father to me.

STDM_0100301_0160.Text: I see. Sorry it had to happen at a time like this.

STDM_0100301_0170.Text: So, have you decided what you want to do?

STDM_0100301_0180.Text: Are casualties like these from Curses pretty common?

STDM_0100301_0190.Text: This one was a rather exceptional case.

STDM_0100301_0200.Text: But in terms of damage, it happens all the time.

STDM_0100301_0210.Text: If all the parts of Sukuna were gone, would it really help? Would there be fewer people getting harmed by Curses?

STDM_0100301_0230.Text: Hmm... So, have you got that finger?

STDM_0100301_0250.Text: Looking at it again here in broad daylight, it's pretty disgusting.

STDM_0100301_0260.Text:
Okay, that's the second one. 
One tenth of the whole. I wonder what's going to happen.

STDM_0100301_0270.Text: Whaagh! So gross! I mean it's so gross it's funny.

STDM_0100301_0280.Text: There. It's not just a physical tolerance that he has. He can fight off Sukuna's attempts to take over.

STDM_0100301_0290.Text: We haven't seen someone with talent like this in a thousand years.

STDM_0100301_0310.Text:
Huh, nothing at all. I take it this means you've made up your mind. 
Chosen your fate?

STDM_0100301_0330.Text: I still don't understand why I have to be executed. But I know, I can't just do nothing.

STDM_0100301_0340.Text: Grandpa, that last request of yours is going to be a pain in the ass.

STDM_0100301_0350.Text: I'll eat every part of Sukuna, after that I don't care. As far as how I'm going to die? I've already decided.

STDM_0100301_0360.Text: My guy. I love finding guys like you! A fun time in hell awaits.

STDM_0100401_0010.Text: Anyway, you're about to have an interview with the principal.

STDM_0100401_0020.Text: Screw this up and he can turn you down for admission, just like that.

STDM_0100401_0030.Text: What's this? So, you're not the boss? Any hierarchy other than strength is worthless.

STDM_0100401_0040.Text: I do owe you a big favor though. Once I make this punk's body my own, you'll be the first one I kill.

STDM_0100401_0050.Text: It's my honor to be targeted by Sukuna himself.

STDM_0100401_0060.Text: This guy is really that famous?

STDM_0100401_0070.Text: Ryomen Sukuna is an imaginary fierce god with four arms and two faces.

STDM_0100401_0080.Text: In the golden age of Jujutsu, Sorcerers gathered all their might to challenge him and failed.

STDM_0100401_0090.Text: Without a doubt, he is the King of Curses.

STDM_0100401_0120.Text: Yuji Itadori! This is an honor!

STDM_0100401_0170.Text: I mean beyond that. What do you hope to find once you've studied Curses and learned the art of exorcising them?

STDM_0100401_0180.Text: It was my grandfather's dying request of me. I just want to save who I can.

STDM_0100401_0200.Text: You're saying you'll fight Curses just because someone else told you to do that?

STDM_0100401_0230.Text: That's not a doll. It's alive.

STDM_0100401_0250.Text: In a way. They're Corpses. Dolls that I've infused with my Curse.

STDM_0100401_0310.Text: A person's true nature reveals itself during a crisis.

STDM_0100401_0320.Text: I'll keep attacking you until I get an acceptable answer.

STDM_0100401_0330.Text: Look man, it wasn't just someone else.

STDM_0100401_0340.Text: It was my grandfather's dying request!

STDM_0100401_0420.Text: A Jujutsu Sorcerer constantly faces death.

STDM_0100401_0430.Text: And not just their own death.

STDM_0100401_0440.Text: Sometimes you must ignore the victims and rend the flesh from those who the Curses murdered.

STDM_0100401_0460.Text: You'd do this because someone else told you to? Don't make me laugh!

STDM_0100401_0480.Text: Are you going to blame your poor grandfather when you get killed by a Curse too?

STDM_0100401_0500.Text: It's not easy to imagine how you'll feel on the verge of death. However, I can say one thing for certain.

STDM_0100401_0510.Text: At the rate you're going, you might end up cursing your beloved grandfather for his dying wish.

STDM_0100401_0520.Text: Jujutsu Sorcerers never die without regret.

STDM_0100401_0530.Text: So I'll ask you just once more. Why have you come here to Jujutsu High?

STDM_0100401_0540.Text: As a kid, I was always better than most in sports and in fights.

STDM_0100401_0550.Text: But never once did I think, this is something only I can do. Never.

STDM_0100401_0570.Text: is something only I can do.

STDM_0100401_0580.Text: So even if I could escape my death sentence and run away from this responsibility, then someday I'd be eating food, taking a bath, or reading manga...

STDM_0100401_0590.Text: and the moment I stop to think, I'd go, "Oh, I bet that right now somewhere out there, someone is dying because of Sukuna."

STDM_0100401_0600.Text: "But that doesn't concern me. It's certainly not my fault." You expect me to tell myself that?

STDM_0100401_0610.Text: Well, I refuse to do that.

STDM_0100401_0620.Text: I don't know how I'll feel when I'm dying, but I won't regret the way I lived.

STDM_0100401_0630.Text: Satoru. Show him to his dorm room.

STDM_0100401_0660.Text: You know, there's no real reason for you to go fight at all.

STDM_0100401_0670.Text: Fushiguro and I could retrieve Sukuna's fingers.

STDM_0100401_0680.Text: I said I'd do it and I will.

STDM_0100401_0690.Text: Yeah, but you wouldn't have refused to fight. I already knew that.

STDM_0100401_0710.Text: If the fingers were that easy to find, don't you think we'd have collected them already?

STDM_0100401_0720.Text: The Sukuna within you will try to regain his power, and that will lead us to the fingers.

STDM_0100401_0740.Text: We won't get very far without you.

STDM_0100401_0760.Text: Hey, Fushiguro! Wow, you look all better now.

STDM_0100401_0770.Text: And together we're heading out tomorrow.

STDM_0100401_0780.Text: We're going to go pick up the third and final first-year.

STDM_0100501_0010.Text: So why are we meeting up here in Harajuku?

STDM_0100501_0020.Text: Because that's what she asked for.

STDM_0100501_0030.Text: Wait. She's the one we have to go and talk to?

STDM_0100501_0070.Text: Right, I'd like you to meet...

STDM_0100501_0080.Text: Nobara Kugisaki. You should be honored, boys. I'm your group's girl.

STDM_0100501_0093.Text: Itadori and Kugisaki are sent on a practical test, supervised by Jujutsu Sorcerer, Satoru Gojo, and Jujutsu High first-year, Megumi Fushiguro.

STDM_0100501_0095.Text: Since Itadori is unable to use Cursed Energy, Gojo lends him the Cursed Tool, Slaughter Demon, on the condition that he doesn't let Sukuna out.

STDM_0100501_0100.Text: I think I'll go in, too.

STDM_0100501_0110.Text: Don't push yourself. You're still recovering, you know.

STDM_0100501_0120.Text: The one we're testing this time around is Nobara.

STDM_0100501_0130.Text: What a pain in my ass. I come all the way to Tokyo and I still have to deal with dumb Curses?

STDM_0100501_0140.Text: Let's save some time. You and I should split up.

STDM_0100501_0160.Text: Let's take this seriously. Curses are dangerous, you know.

STDM_0100501_0170.Text: I don't want to hear it from someone who last week was a clueless normie. Now, get moving.

STDM_0100501_0180.Text: You're an out-of-control roller-coaster of emotions today.

STDM_0100503_0210.Text: Mm-hmm. Have I got moves or what?

STDM_0100503_0220.Text: That Yuji. Some screws are loose.

STDM_0100503_0230.Text: He's fearless. These things take the form of terrifying creatures and try to kill him. Yet, the guy has no hesitation at all.

STDM_0100503_0240.Text: By now you've seen plenty of Jujutsu Sorcerers, some talented, and you've seen them give up because they couldn't conquer their fear or disgust, right?

STDM_0100503_0250.Text: So, today is about seeing if she's crazy enough for this.

STDM_0100601_0020.Text:
Yeah you, mannequin in the center.
You actually think you're hidden
there?

STDM_0100601_0030.Text: Fine then. I'll do this from here.

STDM_0100601_0040.Text: As we know, Curses are born from human minds. So, their strength and numbers grow in proportion to the population.

STDM_0100601_0050.Text: Tokyo Curses are on a different level than those in the countryside.

STDM_0100601_0060.Text: You know, you might wanna pull those out.

STDM_0100601_0070.Text: Or my Cursed Energy will flow into you.

STDM_0100601_0090.Text: Hey, it's all right now. Come on out.

STDM_0100601_0130.Text: It took him hostage. This Curse has intelligence?

STDM_0100601_0140.Text: Damn it. Damn it. Damn it. Damn it.

STDM_0100601_0150.Text: This Curse isn't even all that strong.

STDM_0100601_0170.Text: But it's aware of that. That's why it chose to take a hostage.

STDM_0100601_0180.Text: Calm yourself down. If I die, the boy dies too. But if he dies, I won't die.

STDM_0100601_0190.Text: Logically speaking, it's better if at least I survive. I mean, right?

STDM_0100601_0200.Text: I'm unarmed now. Let the boy go.

STDM_0100601_0210.Text: Poor Saori. I wish I could have seen her one last time.

STDM_0100601_0240.Text: Nice one! Now I can really let loose on it!

STDM_0100603_0250.Text: Oh good. All right, she's crazy.

STDM_0100603_0260.Text: This is why I told you, I said it's dangerous to go alone and you need to take it seriously.

STDM_0100603_0270.Text: Except you never said it was dangerous to go alone.

STDM_0100603_0300.Text:
You know, you've asked me a ton of questions, but I've got one for you. 
Like, why did you come here to Jujutsu High?

STDM_0100603_0310.Text: Because the countryside sucked and I always wanted to live in Tokyo!

STDM_0100603_0320.Text: You'd risk your life just to live in the city?

STDM_0100603_0330.Text: I would. Since it means being true to myself.

STDM_0100603_0340.Text: So as far as that goes, I'm grateful to you too.

STDM_0100603_0350.Text: If you hadn't been here and he or I had been killed, the future wouldn't be so bright.

STDM_0100603_0370.Text: Well, I guess we've all got our own reasons for being here.

STDM_0100603_0380.Text: Drop it! I've given you my thanks already, we're even now!

STDM_0100603_0410.Text: We made sure the kid got home. Now how about we grab some food?

STDM_0100603_0460.Text: He's pouting because he didn't get to fight.

STDM_0100603_0480.Text:
Log: July 2018. West Tokyo City. 
Eishu Juvenile Detention Center. In the sky above the exercise yard. 
Unnamed apparition of potential Special Grade.

STDM_0100603_0500.Text: Its Curse Womb was witnessed by several non-Jujutsu Sorcerers. Due to its emergency nature, three Jujutsu High first-years were dispatched to the scene.

STDM_0100701_0010.Text:
July 2018. West Tokyo City. 
Eishu Juvenile Detention Center. 
Detainee block 2.

STDM_0100701_0020.Text:
Curse Womb confirmed. The facility was evacuated and the area closed off. 
Five inmates were left inside the building.

STDM_0100701_0025.Text: Jujutsu High first-years Yuji Itadori, Megumi Fushiguro, and Nobara Kugisaki were dispatched on a mission to verify and rescue survivors.

STDM_0100701_0030.Text: The Curse Womb was predicted to become a Special Grade Cursed Spirit if it metamorphosed. The students were instructed to avoid contact.

STDM_0100701_0040.Text:
They entered the building into an Innate Domain. 
Megumi Fushiguro's Shikigami Divine Dogs led them to three bodies, including Tadashi Okazaki's.

STDM_0100701_0060.Text: Let's take this body back with us.

STDM_0100701_0080.Text: We won't be able to come back for it later.

STDM_0100701_0090.Text: I didn't say we'd come back. I said leave it behind.

STDM_0100701_0100.Text: Tadashi here hit and killed a little girl on her way home from school while driving without a license, and that was his second offense.

STDM_0100701_0110.Text: I know that you're keen on this idea of saving lots of people and guiding them to proper deaths.

STDM_0100701_0120.Text: But think, how are you going to feel when someone you saved goes on to kill someone else later?

STDM_0100701_0130.Text: So, why did you bother saving me then?

STDM_0100701_0150.Text: You both need to cut it out.

STDM_0100701_0160.Text: This is hardly the time and place to be acting like—

STDM_0100701_0190.Text: We'll find her later. Right now, we—

STDM_0100701_0200.Text: No mistaking it. It's a Special Grade. I can't move.

STDM_0100701_0230.Text: Find Kugisaki and get her out of here.

STDM_0100701_0240.Text: I'll stay here and keep the Special Grade busy, at least until you two are clear of the Innate Domain.

STDM_0100701_0250.Text: As soon as you're both out, give me some kind of signal.

STDM_0100701_0260.Text: And then I'll switch bodies with Sukuna.

STDM_0100801_0020.Text: It's so dark I can't see a damn thing in here.

STDM_0100801_0040.Text: Ugh. How can there be so many?

STDM_0100801_0080.Text: We need to ditch these guys and get out of here. Now.

STDM_0100803_0110.Text: You know, I really hate frogs.

STDM_0100803_0130.Text: We're out of here now, let's go.

STDM_0100901_0020.Text: I thought I was really strong, at least strong enough that I could choose when and how I'd die.

STDM_0100901_0040.Text: Ugh. I don't want to die. But I am going to die.

STDM_0100901_0060.Text: A proper death? Yeah, right. Don't be naive.

STDM_0100901_0070.Text: Jujutsu Sorcerers never die without regret.

STDM_0100901_0080.Text: Still, I want to be able to say my death was a proper one.

STDM_0100901_0090.Text: These negative emotions of mankind become the source of Curses.

STDM_0100901_0100.Text: So, all of the hate. The fear. The regret.

STDM_0100901_0120.Text: and put it in your fist.

STDM_0100901_0140.Text: That howl. That must be the signal from Fushiguro.

STDM_0100901_0150.Text: Incredible. What a pain this brat is.

STDM_0100901_0160.Text: Hold on a minute, I'm thinking here.

STDM_0100901_0170.Text: All right, let's go kill some kids. Follow me.

STDM_0100901_0190.Text: Huh? Oh shit, I healed his other hand too.

STDM_0100901_0200.Text: What? You don't like to take walks?

STDM_0100903_0220.Text: Surprisingly, you and I both are apparently classified as Special Grade.

STDM_0100903_0230.Text: Good job. You and me, man.

STDM_0100903_0240.Text: Pleased with yourself, huh? You want praise now?

STDM_0100903_0250.Text: But healing with Cursed Energy isn't all that difficult. It's a lot easier for Cursed Spirits than it is for humans.

STDM_0100903_0260.Text: Neither you nor this punk whose body I'm in truly understand what Curses really are.

STDM_0100903_0280.Text: So, I'll use it to show you exactly what real Jujutsu is.

STDM_0100903_0300.Text: I was only planning to slice you into three.

STDM_0100903_0310.Text: But I guess you were weaker than I thought.

STDM_0100903_0320.Text: Oh yeah, and then there's this. I will be taking this.

STDM_0100903_0340.Text: What are you waiting for? If you're going to switch, then do it already.

STDM_0101001_0010.Text: Special Grade Cursed Spirit confirmed at the facility. Fushiguro requested expansion of the evacuation area and a Grade 1 Sorcerer's support.

STDM_0101001_0020.Text: Megumi Fushiguro then waited at the scene for Yuji Itadori's safe return.

STDM_0101001_0030.Text: The Innate Domain closed, and almost immediately, Ryomen Sukuna, who had incarnated within Yuji Itadori's body, came out to meet Fushiguro.

STDM_0101001_0040.Text: There's no reason to be scared. I'm in such a great mood right now.

STDM_0101001_0050.Text: Let's just chat for a bit. The kid had it coming for just using me without making any kind of a deal.

STDM_0101001_0060.Text: And now it feels like he's having some trouble switching back.

STDM_0101001_0070.Text: But then no matter what he did, this would have ended up the same.

STDM_0101001_0080.Text: So, I've been thinking about the different ways I can do this.

STDM_0101001_0100.Text: Oh and also, for good measure.

STDM_0101001_0110.Text: And with that, I'm as free as a bird. And now you can be frightened.

STDM_0101002_0120.Text: And just like that, our positions are now reversed.

STDM_0101002_0130.Text: How interesting. You can use your Shikigami but you still come at me yourself.

STDM_0101002_0150.Text: It's not even a matter of Jujutsu. His power and his agility are on a different level.

STDM_0101002_0170.Text: You use the shadows to create your Shikigami.

STDM_0101002_0190.Text: Hm... There's just one thing I don't get.

STDM_0101002_0200.Text: Why did you run from the Special Grade back then? You left Itadori to fend for himself.

STDM_0101002_0210.Text: Kind of a waste of your talents.

STDM_0101002_0220.Text: By the way, that certainly won't be enough to fix his heart.

STDM_0101002_0240.Text: Risking your life for meaningless shit. This punk isn't even close to being worth the effort.

STDM_0101003_0250.Text: The only thing granted equally to all is an unfair reality.

STDM_0101003_0270.Text: Evil people are only judged under the law. Jujutsu Sorcerers are just another cog in that machine of retribution.

STDM_0101003_0280.Text: I want good people to enjoy fairness even if only a few will.

STDM_0101003_0290.Text: And so, I save people unequally.

STDM_0101003_0310.Text: So, this is when you start burning through your life.

STDM_0101003_0320.Text:
Megumi! Show me what 
you've got.

STDM_0101003_0330.Text: Sacred Treasure. Swing and Ring, Ring Eight Gri—

STDM_0101003_0340.Text: Oh, and just so you know.

STDM_0101003_0350.Text: I didn't have any logical reason for saving you back then.

STDM_0101003_0360.Text: Even though it was dangerous, I just couldn't bear to see a good person like you die.

STDM_0101003_0370.Text:
Sure, I had my reservations. 
But ultimately, I did it for selfish, emotional reasons.

STDM_0101003_0380.Text: But that's fine though. I'm a Jujutsu Sorcerer.

STDM_0101003_0410.Text: I've never once regretted saving you.

STDM_0101003_0430.Text: I think your conviction is a good one, but I don't think mine is exactly wrong either.

STDM_0101003_0440.Text: Ugh... Sorry, I guess I'm done for.

STDM_0101003_0450.Text: I hope you live a long life.

STDM_0201101_0010.Text: The Special Grade, sending first-years to rescue five people who may already be dead should have been out of the question.

STDM_0201101_0020.Text: Besides with Yuji, I was the one who forced the issue and got the kid's execution sentence suspended.

STDM_0201101_0030.Text: Some higher-ups didn't like that and so they took advantage of my absence, and used the Special Grade to dispose of Yuji.

STDM_0201101_0040.Text: Trying to pin the blame is such a pain.

STDM_0201101_0050.Text: Maybe I ought to just cut to the chase and go kill off all those higher-ups.

STDM_0201101_0070.Text: Sounds to me like you took quite a liking to this one.

STDM_0201101_0080.Text: I've always been the kind of guy who cares about his students.

STDM_0201101_0090.Text: So this here is Sukuna's vessel, huh? I can cut him up, yes?

STDM_0201101_0100.Text: Just make good use of him.

STDM_0201101_0110.Text: He said live a long life?

STDM_0201101_0115.Text: Guess that doesn't mean much when you die yourself.

STDM_0201101_0120.Text: First time? Having a partner of yours die on you?

STDM_0201101_0140.Text: Huh. You're taking it well though.

STDM_0201101_0160.Text: Well, of course. Two weeks ago I didn't even know him.

STDM_0201101_0170.Text: I'm not the type to break down and fall to pieces when a guy I barely know dies.

STDM_0201101_0180.Text: So what's this? You're looking even more bummed out than usual, Megumi.

STDM_0201101_0210.Text: Stop calling me by my last name.

STDM_0201101_0230.Text: Someone died yesterday. A boy. He was one of the first-years.

STDM_0201101_0255.Text: Now I look like some kind of heartless, cold-blooded ice demon.

STDM_0201101_0280.Text: Sorry to hit you up with this now when you're in mourning.

STDM_0201101_0290.Text: But see, we'd like you both to be in the Tokyo-Kyoto Sister School Exchange Event.

STDM_0201101_0300.Text: The whole event starts with the principals of the Tokyo and Kyoto schools. Each principal proposes a form of competition that will be held for an entire day over the course of two days.

STDM_0201101_0320.Text: Or at least that's how it's supposed to go. It goes like this. Day one is team battles and day two is individual battles.

STDM_0201101_0330.Text:
Team battles and individual? 
You mean we fight other Jujutsu Sorcerers?

STDM_0201101_0340.Text: Yeah, they're Jujutsu battles where anything short of killing is fair game.

STDM_0201101_0350.Text: Don't worry. We'll train you up. So, you probably won't get killed.

STDM_0201101_0360.Text: So, are you in? I understand your partner just died.

STDM_0201101_0410.Text: Have to get stronger and I'll do anything to achieve that.

STDM_0201101_0420.Text: Have to get stronger and I'll do anything to achieve that.

STDM_0201201_0010.Text: What possibly could have been so important that you decided to use a precious finger on Sukuna? Trying to see how strong he is?

STDM_0201201_0020.Text:
Well, the test was half-baked.
I'll admit that, but we did still learn a few things.

STDM_0201201_0030.Text: I can only pray that's not an excuse.

STDM_0201201_0050.Text: Humans are practically made of lies. For every positive action and emotion they show, there's always a flip side.

STDM_0201201_0060.Text: And yet, negative emotions like hatred and hostility are truth without falsehood.

STDM_0201201_0070.Text: Since we Curses are born from those raw, true emotions, that makes us true, pure beings.

STDM_0201201_0090.Text: Yet, at the moment, you're the ones who are getting eliminated.

STDM_0201201_0100.Text: And that's why we've come here to ask you. What can we do to defeat the Jujutsu Sorcerers?

STDM_0201201_0110.Text: If you want to win, you'll need to fulfill two conditions. The first thing concerns the strongest Sorcerer.

STDM_0201201_0120.Text: You must somehow render Satoru Gojo incapable of fighting. The second is to get Ryomen Sukuna and Yuji Itadori on your side.

STDM_0201201_0130.Text: Hmm? But hold on a minute. He died, didn't he? That Yuji Itadori, he's dead.

STDM_0201201_0140.Text: Yeah... Did he die? I'm not so sure.

STDM_0201301_0010.Text:
Don't poke around inside me. 
Not without my permission. 
I hate that, punk ass.

STDM_0201301_0020.Text: Then you come down here and I'll tear you open.

STDM_0201301_0030.Text: You're being awfully hostile, aren't you?

STDM_0201301_0040.Text:
Huh, you've got that right. 
You expect kindness after you murdered me?

STDM_0201301_0050.Text: Where are we anyway? Is this hell? I'm not crazy about being stuck with you for eternity, but I'll make it work.

STDM_0201302_0070.Text: I hope you're ready for this!

STDM_0201303_0100.Text: This isn't the afterlife. This place is my Innate Domain.

STDM_0201303_0110.Text: If you'll accept my conditions, I'll fix your heart and bring us both back to life.

STDM_0201303_0120.Text: Cocky bastard. Don't act like you're doing me a favor. I know you don't want to die either.

STDM_0201303_0130.Text: But the situation has changed. Very soon, I'll be able to see something interesting. I have just two conditions.

STDM_0201303_0140.Text: Number one: whenever I chant the word "Extension," you'll surrender your body to me for one minute. Two: you'll completely forget you made this promise.

STDM_0201303_0170.Text:
No way. I don't know what 
you're after here, but it's 
shady as hell.

STDM_0201303_0180.Text: Finally get what you're really about now. You are pure evil and I'm not lending you my body ever again.

STDM_0201303_0190.Text: During that minute I won't kill or injure anyone. Is that enough to address your concerns?

STDM_0201303_0210.Text: It's not about whether you believe me or not. This is a pact. A geas. I'll be the one punished if I break it.

STDM_0201303_0230.Text: And if you pursue selfish gain beyond your means, you will suffer retribution. I'm certain you've experienced that yourself.

STDM_0201303_0240.Text: A pact, bounded in mutual interest. That's one of the key factors behind all Jujutsu.

STDM_0201303_0250.Text: Fine then. Get off me already. I'll accept your conditions.

STDM_0201303_0270.Text: I don't understand exactly what you're up to. Just that it means I'll come back to life.

STDM_0201303_0290.Text: Bring me back to life without any conditions. It's all thanks to you I died in the first place.

STDM_0201303_0310.Text: We'll fight to the death, and I'll do it without conditions if you defeat me. But if I win, then you live under my two conditions.

STDM_0201303_0320.Text: Yeah. I'll kick your ass for...

STDM_0201401_0020.Text: As you can see in this case with Yuji, the top of the Jujutsu world is a den of vice.

STDM_0201401_0030.Text: And I want to reset that garbage Jujutsu world.

STDM_0201401_0040.Text: Murdering all the fools at the top would be an easy task.

STDM_0201401_0050.Text: But no fix, because they'd all just get replaced and then there'd be no revolution.

STDM_0201401_0060.Text: Plus, if I did that, no one would want to follow me.

STDM_0201401_0070.Text: That's why I chose education instead, as a way to raise up strong, clever compatriots.

STDM_0201401_0080.Text: And they're all talented. Especially Hakari, the third-year. And the second-year, Okkotsu. They'll become Jujutsu Sorcerers on par with me.

STDM_0201401_0100.Text: Yuji would've been one of them as well.

STDM_0201401_0110.Text: Hey, you two. I'm going to get started. Are you going to watch from there?

STDM_0201401_0160.Text: I need you to just leave him listed as deceased on the records.

STDM_0201401_0170.Text: I want us to give Yuji the time to regain minimum power before he gets targeted again.

STDM_0201401_0180.Text: Oh. So, you're going to keep Itadori hidden away?

STDM_0201401_0190.Text: No, I'll have him back in time for the Exchange Event.

STDM_0201401_0210.Text: The reason is simple. No one can be allowed to take the events of youth away from the young people they're designed for.

STDM_0201401_0230.Text: Satoru Gojo. I wonder, could we kill him if we joined forces?

STDM_0201401_0240.Text: No, he'd either flutter out of your grasp, or in the worst case, you'd all get exorcised.

STDM_0201401_0250.Text: I would recommend you pour your energy into sealing him rather than killing him.

STDM_0201401_0260.Text: How? Do you have a lead?

STDM_0201401_0270.Text: We'll use the Special Grade Cursed Object: Prison Realm.

STDM_0201401_0300.Text: Give me the Prison Realm. I'll add it to my collection and in return, I promise you. I'll kill Gojo.

STDM_0201501_0040.Text: Let me explain Cursed Energy for you again. All students are trained to produce Cursed Energy using even the faintest sparks of emotion.

STDM_0201501_0050.Text: And they're training ways to avoid wasting their Cursed Energy when their emotions are flaring up as well.

STDM_0201501_0060.Text: There are several training methods for this. The one I'm going to use on you is especially exhausting.

STDM_0201501_0090.Text: Of course, you won't be watching them all alone. You'll be watching them with this guy.

STDM_0201501_0100.Text: Oh, what's with the cute but creepy doll?

STDM_0201501_0120.Text: That Cursed Corpse will wake up and attack you just like that, if you don't keep Cursed Energy flowing into it.

STDM_0201501_0130.Text: This trains you to maintain a steady output of Cursed Energy no matter what emotions you feel.

STDM_0201501_0140.Text: Ow... I thought there'd be more fighting involved.

STDM_0201501_0150.Text: Well, look at how your last fight turned out. If you want to get stronger, start by mastering the basics.

STDM_0201601_0030.Text: What does it matter to you?

STDM_0201601_0040.Text: As a Sorcerer, what kind of people do you want to save?

STDM_0201601_0050.Text: Huh? What difference would it make to me whether my actions save anyone at all?

STDM_0201601_0060.Text: I knew I shouldn't have asked you.

STDM_0201601_0090.Text: Quit asking interview prep questions and come switch places with me!

STDM_0201601_0100.Text: What the hell are they doing?

STDM_0201603_0160.Text: Fushiguro! Quit slacking off and get involved!

STDM_0201701_0010.Text: Only a month and a half left. So, no daydreaming.

STDM_0201701_0020.Text: You're both pretty weak in close quarters.

STDM_0201701_0030.Text: See if you can land a blow on us.

STDM_0201702_0090.Text: Don't look away for a second.

STDM_0201703_0100.Text: All right. I think we're done here.

STDM_0201703_0130.Text: Nothing. I was just wondering how I'd carry the Cursed Tools during a fight.

STDM_0201703_0150.Text: I'm fine with supplementing close combat with weapons, but with my Cursed Technique I want to be able to have my hands free.

STDM_0201703_0153.Text: So, Zen'in. You often carry around two or even more with you, don't you? How do you do that?

STDM_0201703_0155.Text: Oh, I make Panda carry them.

STDM_0201703_0157.Text: I knew I shouldn't have asked, part two.

STDM_0201703_0160.Text: Why did you run? Kind of a waste of your talents.

STDM_0201703_0170.Text: Do I have the potential to beat Special Grades? Is that what he meant by that?

STDM_0201703_0190.Text: I think I know how to do it.

STDM_0201801_0010.Text: All right, Nobara. Next up, I'm going to teach you how to fight against multiple opponents.

STDM_0201801_0020.Text: Cursed Spirits don't always come at you on their own.

STDM_0201801_0030.Text: Yeah. I got surrounded at the detention center and things got pretty dicey.

STDM_0201801_0060.Text: I'm not bullying her. I'll go easy.

STDM_0201801_0080.Text: That's not important right now. Here I come!

STDM_0201803_0120.Text: You focus too much on one opponent, Nobara.

STDM_0201803_0130.Text: Even if you're only fighting one, always stay aware of the other.

STDM_0201803_0140.Text: Do you have eyes on the back of your head or something?

STDM_0201803_0150.Text: Don't be stupid. There are four other senses you can use.

STDM_0201803_0170.Text: Well boo-hoo! I'm sorry I look so mean all the time!

STDM_0201803_0180.Text: I still don't get how you can understand him.

STDM_0201803_0190.Text: You get used to it after a couple months.

STDM_0201803_0200.Text: I just don't think I would.

STDM_0201901_0030.Text: Glad you asked. Since you're paired up with me, you're going to practice fighting against a larger opponent.

STDM_0201901_0050.Text: Your opponent's reach, the power behind their attacks...

STDM_0201901_0060.Text: These are all things you have to keep in mind during combat.

STDM_0201901_0070.Text: Cursed Spirits can be pretty big sometimes.

STDM_0201901_0080.Text: No kidding. So I'm going to keep laying into you until you get the hang of it.

STDM_0201902_0100.Text: No need to worry about that.

STDM_0201903_0130.Text: Yeah. You'll be fine up against a large enemy like me now.

STDM_0201903_0140.Text: I might come across a Cursed Spirit your size, but do you think I'd ever meet a Sorcerer that big?

STDM_0201903_0150.Text: Doesn't hurt to be prepared. You'll come across one when you least expect it.

STDM_0202001_0030.Text: Maki's putting me through the wringer. Can you blame me for taking a break?

STDM_0202001_0040.Text: I've got Panda. He's relentless. Said he won't let up until I've got the hang of it.

STDM_0202001_0070.Text: You both look worn out. Wanna chill with me for a while?

STDM_0202001_0080.Text: Somehow I just don't believe you mean that.

STDM_0202001_0100.Text:
I've got a surprise for you that'll help you unwind. 
Some special training!

STDM_0202001_0150.Text: Wait. You're actually going to do it, Fushiguro?

STDM_0202001_0160.Text: We're going to work on your Cursed Techniques.

STDM_0202001_0170.Text: You only did close combat with the second-years. You haven't trained your Cursed Techniques yet, have you?

STDM_0202001_0190.Text:
The enemy won't wait for you just because you're tired, Kugisaki. 
I'm going to do it. You should, too.

STDM_0202002_0210.Text: It'll be a good chance to kick your ass, anyway.

STDM_0202002_0220.Text: Don't let your guard down, Kugisaki.

STDM_0202002_0230.Text: No need to hold back. Give me all the Cursed Techniques you've got.

STDM_0202003_0270.Text: I think you overdid it this time, Gojo...

STDM_0202003_0280.Text: Hah. You'll never get strong enough to beat me with that attitude.

STDM_0202003_0320.Text: If you're not joining me, I'll do it on my own.

STDM_0202003_0340.Text: The hell you will. If we couldn't even beat him together, then what makes you think you can do it on your own?

STDM_0202003_0370.Text: That's what I like to see!

STDM_0202101_0010.Text: Well, Gojo's got to get going, so just keep hanging in there.

STDM_0202101_0020.Text: Is this really going to make me stronger?

STDM_0202101_0090.Text: Satoru Gojo was attacked by an unregistered Special Grade Cursed Spirit on his way to a meeting with Jujutsu High Principal, Masamichi Yaga.

STDM_0202101_0100.Text: The Spirit was intelligent enough to hold conversation, and Gojo estimated his Cursed Energy to be higher than that of Sukuna's current incarnation.

STDM_0202101_0110.Text: Suspecting that the Cursed Spirit may be collaborating with a Curse user, Gojo attempted to incapacitate it and ascertain its intentions.

STDM_0202102_0120.Text: Special Grades are classified as such because they're special.

STDM_0202102_0130.Text: Having them pop up this frequently throws everything off.

STDM_0202102_0140.Text: Hahaha. Oh, don't tell me I wounded your pride.

STDM_0202102_0150.Text: No. I'm starting to enjoy this.

STDM_0202102_0160.Text: What's going on here? Why didn't my attack land?

STDM_0202102_0170.Text: What you actually attacked was the Infinity existing between you and me.

STDM_0202103_0180.Text: Infinity exists everywhere. I just use my Jujutsu to bring it forward into reality.

STDM_0202103_0190.Text: Convergence, Divergence. What do you think happens when one touches this void?

STDM_0202103_0220.Text: You can try, but you'll die, Jogo.

STDM_0202103_0230.Text: I guess it wasn't just talk.

STDM_0202103_0240.Text: No matter. If I can't hit him, I'll just drag him into my Domain.

STDM_0202103_0260.Text:
Hey, what's going on here? Where the hell are we? 
How did I get here?

STDM_0202201_0020.Text: It's a field trip lesson. I'm going to teach you about the very pinnacle of Jujutsu battles: Domain Expansion.

STDM_0202201_0030.Text: He's just here to watch. You see, I'm in the midst of teaching him a lot of things, so forget about him and let's just fight.

STDM_0202201_0040.Text: Having him tag along with you isn't going to slow you down? It makes you look like an idiot.

STDM_0202201_0050.Text: Oh no, it'll all be fine. I mean, really, you're kind of weak. Haha.

STDM_0202201_0060.Text: How dare you insult me like that. I'm going to enjoy tearing off that smug face of yours.

STDM_0202201_0070.Text: You'll be fine. Just stay here, close to me.

STDM_0202202_0100.Text: There won't even be ashes left of you, Satoru Gojo.

STDM_0202202_0120.Text: The Innate Domain is made with Cursed Energy. Then you imbue it with a Cursed Technique.

STDM_0202202_0130.Text: Spreading out in an Innate Domain that way always consumes a ton of energy, but the advantages make it worth it.

STDM_0202202_0140.Text: One of them is the boost to stats due to environmental factors.

STDM_0202202_0150.Text: Kinda like a buff in a video game!

STDM_0202202_0170.Text: The Techniques imbued in the Domain are always sure to hit within that Domain.

STDM_0202202_0180.Text: But don't worry. There are several ways to deal with it.

STDM_0202202_0190.Text: I don't really recommend this one, but you can try to go outside the Domain. That's usually impossible.

STDM_0202202_0200.Text: The most effective way to deal with the Domain...

STDM_0202202_0210.Text: ...is to lay out your own domain.

STDM_0202202_0220.Text: When two Domains are laid out at the same time, the more refined one will dominate that space.

STDM_0202203_0250.Text: What just happened? Can it be that my Domain was overwhelmed?

STDM_0202203_0260.Text: This is the inner world of Limitless.

STDM_0202203_0280.Text: Every act in life is repeated infinitely, over and over.

STDM_0202203_0300.Text: When granted every possible thing, you can't use it. All you can do is die peacefully.

STDM_0202203_0310.Text: But I have some things I still want to ask you, so for right now...

STDM_0202203_0320.Text: I'm going to let you off the hook with just this.

STDM_0202203_0330.Text: Now then, just who instructed you to come after me?

STDM_0202203_0350.Text: What now? Will you rescue him?

STDM_0202203_0360.Text: If you want to save him, then go ahead and save him. Though, I don't know. Do your kind have sentimental emotions?

STDM_0202203_0380.Text: That's quite a statement for a Cursed Spirit to make.

STDM_0202203_0390.Text:
Was something good supposed to happen if you killed me?
Regardless, you're going to have to tell me. Who sent you? I want a name.

STDM_0202203_0400.Text: So weird. Curses are capable of conversations?

STDM_0202203_0440.Text: It's just a Curse, and it's stripping away my will to fight.

STDM_0202203_0450.Text: Leave me, Gojo. Go after them. I'll be fine.

STDM_0202203_0460.Text: Wait, forget that. I lied. I need help.

STDM_0202203_0480.Text: He got away. He's good at hiding his presence. He's way more impressive than volcano head.

STDM_0202203_0490.Text:
So now Cursed Spirits of that level are joining forces. 
It's getting interesting.

STDM_0202203_0500.Text: Yuji, I want you as well as all of your classmates to become strong enough that you can beat that.

STDM_0202203_0520.Text: Now that we've set you a goal, all that's left is to pursue it and then obtain it.

STDM_0202203_0530.Text: Let's speed up your schedule. For the next month, you'll still be watching movies, but you'll also be fighting against me.

STDM_0202203_0540.Text: Will I still even be alive after a month of that?

STDM_0202301_0030.Text: Death's door. Hanami went to save him though. So, he'll probably be fine.

STDM_0202301_0040.Text: How irresponsible. And you're the one who egged him on.

STDM_0202301_0050.Text: Heavens no, I tried to stop him.

STDM_0202301_0070.Text: Jogo. Hanami. Glad to see you're okay.

STDM_0202301_0080.Text: How the hell can you look at me like this and say I'm okay?

STDM_0202301_0090.Text: You're lucky that you got off so easy.

STDM_0202301_0100.Text: Maybe now at least you understand. So, we'll go about sealing Satoru Gojo at the appropriate time in the appropriate place...

STDM_0202301_0110.Text: once we've secured our advantage over him.

STDM_0202301_0120.Text: D-Day is October 31st in Shibuya. Later I'll have more details.

STDM_0202301_0150.Text: Let's be cunning, as Curses should. And humans should.

STDM_0202401_0010.Text: As a Sorcerer, you won't only be up against Cursed Spirits, but you may also have to fight people who misuse Jujutsu, called Curse users.

STDM_0202401_0020.Text: I'm going to teach you how to fight a Sorcerer.

STDM_0202401_0030.Text: You'd probably have to fight each Sorcerer differently though, right?

STDM_0202401_0040.Text: Jujutsu can take a great many forms, so there are as many ways to fight a Sorcerer as there are Sorcerers.

STDM_0202401_0050.Text: However, they can be narrowed down a bit.

STDM_0202401_0060.Text: I'll get into it as we fight.

STDM_0202402_0080.Text: All right! Don't blame me if you get hurt.

STDM_0202402_0090.Text: That's what I like to hear.

STDM_0202403_0100.Text: Ugh, I can't land a single hit. Gojo really is on another level.

STDM_0202403_0110.Text: Your Cursed Energy comes up a little slow, huh?

STDM_0202403_0130.Text: Your Cursed Energy can't keep up with your explosive power.

STDM_0202403_0140.Text: You're still not good at collecting your Cursed Energy, so it lags behind.

STDM_0202403_0150.Text: But in effect, that creates an irregular energy flow.

STDM_0202403_0160.Text: The moment after your fist impacts, your Cursed Energy slams in...

STDM_0202403_0170.Text: So, you're creating two impacts with every stroke.

STDM_0202403_0190.Text: It's not a skill many Sorcerers have.

STDM_0202403_0200.Text: This weapon will serve you well.

STDM_0202403_0210.Text: I look forward to seeing you improve.

STDM_0202403_0230.Text: Well, I've got to go do something.

STDM_0202403_0260.Text: You just keep up with your training.

STDM_0202501_0010.Text: Your training's not over yet. This time, the loser has to run our errands.

STDM_0202501_0030.Text: It's more motivation to win, isn't it?

STDM_0202501_0050.Text: So I just have to win, right?

STDM_0202501_0060.Text: You two can team up if you want.

STDM_0202502_0073.Text: Land a blow on me, I dare you.

STDM_0202502_0078.Text: Who do you think I am? I'm all over it.

STDM_0202503_0080.Text: Well, look at that. I win.

STDM_0202503_0090.Text: You know the deal. Off you go, now!

STDM_0202503_0110.Text: There aren't any vending machines nearby.

STDM_0202503_0120.Text: Hey, Maki. Still on special training?

STDM_0202503_0160.Text: They can handle an errand run. They're not three years old.

STDM_0202503_0170.Text: No, that's not what I'm saying.

STDM_0202503_0180.Text: I'm saying today's the day Kyoto's principal comes here.

STDM_0202503_0190.Text: You mean Mai is coming? Speak up.

STDM_0202601_0010.Text: Mai Zen'in? I'm surprised to see you. What are you doing here?

STDM_0202601_0020.Text: You can drop the "Zen'in," Fushiguro. Don't call me the same way you do Maki.

STDM_0202601_0030.Text: You ought to just call me Mai.

STDM_0202601_0040.Text: We came along with the principal because we were worried about you.

STDM_0202601_0050.Text: Your classmate died, we heard. Was that rough, or did it not affect you that much?

STDM_0202601_0060.Text: What are you trying to say?

STDM_0202601_0070.Text: Calling him a vessel makes it sound nice, but the truth is he was a half-Cursed monster.

STDM_0202601_0080.Text: So, aren't you feeling better now that he's dead?

STDM_0202601_0090.Text: Mai, why do you always have to stir things up?

STDM_0202601_0100.Text: I'm only here for one thing, to see if these guys are fit to take Okkotsu's place. That's all I want to know.

STDM_0202601_0120.Text: What kind of woman is your type?

STDM_0202601_0130.Text: Oh and by the way, my type of woman is a tall one with a big, gorgeous ass.

STDM_0202601_0140.Text: Why would I want to discuss my taste in women? Especially with you, a guy I just met?

STDM_0202601_0150.Text: A person's fetishes, reveal everything about him.

STDM_0202601_0160.Text:
Now answer me, Fushiguro. 
What kind of woman is your type?

STDM_0202601_0170.Text: I don't really have a type.

STDM_0202601_0180.Text: As long as one's character is unshakable, there is nothing more I can ask for.

STDM_0202602_0220.Text: You're flimsy and shallow. Both your body, and your taste in women.

STDM_0202603_0250.Text: Are you even trying to fight?

STDM_0202603_0260.Text: You're acting so proud, but I've been holding back. Fine then. If you insist.

STDM_0202603_0290.Text: What the hell are you two doing?

STDM_0202603_0300.Text: A long time no see, Panda.

STDM_0202603_0310.Text: Why couldn't you just wait until the Exchange Event? Now go on home or I'll start screaming.

STDM_0202603_0320.Text: You don't have to tell me to go home.

STDM_0202603_0330.Text: Just what do you think you're doing to our errand runner, Mai?

STDM_0202603_0340.Text: Oh. You're such a loser. I didn't even notice you come in, Maki.

STDM_0202603_0350.Text: If I'm a loser, then you must be one too.

STDM_0202603_0360.Text: All you can do is imbue objects with Cursed Energy, and you've got shit for Cursed Techniques.

STDM_0202603_0370.Text: Better than no Cursed Energy at all. My neck gets so sore looking up at others all the time. So I need you, dear sister, to look down on.

STDM_0202603_0380.Text: You put a bunch of holes in my brand-new tracksuit. I ought to rip this rag off you and use it to make my own summer uniform.

STDM_0202603_0410.Text: I am, but I'm just getting started here.

STDM_0202603_0420.Text: No, you're not. Unlike you, I have important business to attend to here in Tokyo.

STDM_0202603_0430.Text: My personal handshake. And it's with Takada.

STDM_0202603_0440.Text: Who knows what I might do if I don't catch that train and I can't make it to the hall on time?

STDM_0202603_0480.Text: As for you, you won't get off this easy at the Exchange Event.

STDM_0202603_0490.Text: Quit acting like you beat me, dammit!

STDM_0202603_0520.Text: She said you don't have Cursed Energy.

STDM_0202603_0530.Text: Yes, that's true. In fact, I need these to even see Curses.

STDM_0202603_0540.Text: That's why I use Cursed Tools. They already have Curses imbued in them.

STDM_0202603_0550.Text: Then why be a Jujutsu Sorcerer?

STDM_0202603_0560.Text: To spite my family. I can't wait to see their faces when I become a big-shot Sorcerer. After all, they've looked down on me all these years.

STDM_0202603_0570.Text: You know, I really respect you, Maki.

STDM_0202701_0010.Text: Hey, Maki. Megumi is all right.

STDM_0202701_0020.Text: But geez, Nobara, you're looking rough. What happened to you?

STDM_0202701_0050.Text: She had a projectile weapon and I was unarmed! She wouldn't have got me otherwise.

STDM_0202701_0070.Text: Dammit! I need to get strong enough to beat her even if I'm caught off guard, or without any weapons.

STDM_0202701_0100.Text: At the end of the day, I've only got myself to rely on. Hey, you two.

STDM_0202701_0120.Text: Come at me. I want to do some close-combat training.

STDM_0202701_0130.Text: Right now? Don't you need to rest first?

STDM_0202701_0140.Text: If not now, then when? Yes, right now!

STDM_0202701_0150.Text: Looks like we've gotta do this, Toge.

STDM_0202701_0170.Text: Don't let me down, guys. It'd be embarrassing if you lost two against one.

STDM_0202703_0180.Text: She's serious all of a sudden.

STDM_0202703_0220.Text: My brand new tracksuit! You got it even dirtier, you jerk!

STDM_0202703_0240.Text: Whatever. I'll buy an even nicer one, and no one will even get close to ruining it next time.

STDM_0202801_0010.Text: Why is Yaga still not here?

STDM_0202801_0020.Text: I'm sorry, but Principal Yaga won't be here for a while.

STDM_0202801_0030.Text: Somehow, the schedule he was given was incorrect.

STDM_0202801_0040.Text: Thank you for the other day, Principal Gakuganji.

STDM_0202801_0050.Text: Sorry, what day are you referring to?

STDM_0202801_0060.Text: Don't play dumb with me, old man. I'm talking about Yuji Itadori. As head of the conservatives, you were involved too, right?

STDM_0202801_0070.Text: Last night, I was attacked by two unregistered Special Grade Cursed Spirits.

STDM_0202801_0080.Text: Oh? Well, that is very unfortunate.

STDM_0202801_0090.Text: Don't get me wrong here. It was about as much trouble as answering a sidewalk survey.

STDM_0202801_0100.Text: These two Cursed Spirits were capable of communication, and they probably have allies who are just as strong.

STDM_0202801_0110.Text: And it's not just our foes. Hakari, Okkotsu, and your Todo. In recent years, the quality level of our students has risen dramatically as well.

STDM_0202801_0113.Text: Then there was last year's incident with Suguru Geto.

STDM_0202801_0115.Text: And now, the appearance of Sukuna's vessel.

STDM_0202801_0120.Text: The wave of power you guys have been trying to hold back with your pointless status and traditions...

STDM_0202801_0130.Text: has grown bigger than you can handle and is now descending upon us.

STDM_0202801_0140.Text: You won't be able to measure the coming age with just the classification of Special Grade.

STDM_0202801_0150.Text: And if you really believe I'm the only one who's going to fight back, you're going to wind up hurt, old man.

STDM_0202801_0160.Text: I think that you're way out of line, young man.

STDM_0202801_0170.Text: Oh. I'm scared. Well, I've said all I wanted to say, so I'll be going now.

STDM_0202801_0180.Text: Oh, and Principal Yaga will be along in a couple of hours. Later.

STDM_0202801_0190.Text:
Log: September 2018. 
Kinema Cinema, Kawasaki City, Kanagawa Prefecture.

STDM_0202801_0200.Text: After the showing, three high school boys' disfigured corpses were discovered by staff.

STDM_0202801_0210.Text: Cause of death: increased cranial pressure and respiratory paralysis due to cranial deformity.

STDM_0202801_0230.Text: Did you do that? Inside the theater.

STDM_0202801_0240.Text: Wow, so you can actually see me.

STDM_0302901_0010.Text: If I had a button I could push that would make everyone I hate die, I probably wouldn't push it.

STDM_0302901_0020.Text: But if there was a button that would make everyone who hated me die, I'd push it without hesitation.

STDM_0302901_0030.Text: You three guys ought to learn some manners.

STDM_0302901_0060.Text: And if they could, would they really be human?

STDM_0302901_0080.Text: Excuse me... Did you do that? Inside the theater.

STDM_0302901_0090.Text: Wow, so you can actually see me.

STDM_0302901_0100.Text: What if I am the one who did it? Are you going to condemn me now?

STDM_0302901_0110.Text: Were those three special to you? Were they your friends?

STDM_0302901_0130.Text: So. Can I? Can I do that too?

STDM_0303001_0010.Text: Three high school students were found disfigured in Kinema Cinema. Suspecting that Cursed Spirits may have been behind the incident,

STDM_0303001_0020.Text: Special Grade Sorcerer Satoru Gojo dispatched Grade 1 Sorcerer Kento Nanami, along with Jujutsu High first-year Yuji Itadori to investigate.

STDM_0303001_0030.Text: I don't recognize you as a Sorcerer either.

STDM_0303001_0040.Text: But even if you are just a vessel for the time bomb we know as Sukuna, I'm hoping you can prove yourself to be useful.

STDM_0303001_0050.Text: Huh. Lately, I've been forced to realize how weak and useless I am.

STDM_0303001_0070.Text: I have to get strong or I won't be able to choose how I die.

STDM_0303001_0080.Text: So, there wasn't anything weird on the surveillance cameras, right?

STDM_0303001_0090.Text: Right. There was only one young man aside from the victims.

STDM_0303001_0100.Text: Then it was a Cursed Spirit?

STDM_0303001_0130.Text: A Cursed Spirit. Let's see if you can handle it.

STDM_0303001_0140.Text: If you decide you're in over your head, give a shout.

STDM_0303001_0150.Text: Why do you think so little of me? Give me a chance.

STDM_0303001_0160.Text: It's not about whether I'm underestimating you or not. I'm the adult here, and you're still a child.

STDM_0303001_0170.Text: I have a duty to prioritize your life over my own.

STDM_0303001_0180.Text: You've faced several life-or-death situations, but that does not make you an adult.

STDM_0303001_0190.Text: The accumulation of those little moments of despair in life is what makes a person an adult.

STDM_0303002_0200.Text: My Cursed Technique allows me to forcibly create a weak point I can exploit on any opponent.

STDM_0303002_0210.Text: 7:3. Striking the point at that ratio when you draw a line along the target's length causes a critical hit.

STDM_0303002_0220.Text: That allows me to deal a fair amount of damage even to those ranked higher than me.

STDM_0303002_0230.Text: Should you really be revealing something like that to the enemy?

STDM_0303002_0240.Text: There is merit to it. Revealing one's hand is a gambling tactic that increases the effectiveness of one's Technique.

STDM_0303003_0260.Text: All of that force came from me.

STDM_0303101_0030.Text: I don't like you turning your back on your opponent.

STDM_0303101_0040.Text: You're the one who keeps distracting me here.

STDM_0303102_0070.Text: Your Cursed Energy comes up a little slow, huh?

STDM_0303102_0080.Text: Your Cursed Energy can't keep up with your explosive power.

STDM_0303102_0090.Text: The moment after your fist impacts, your Cursed Energy slams in...

STDM_0303102_0100.Text: So, you're creating two impacts with every stroke.

STDM_0303103_0130.Text: He has room to grow too. If he can learn to imbue 100% of his Cursed Energy into 100% of his martial arts...

STDM_0303103_0140.Text: Now I see why Gojo brought him to me.

STDM_0303103_0160.Text: Itadori. Wait, don't finish it off yet.

STDM_0303103_0180.Text: But I thought Curses didn't show up in photographs.

STDM_0303103_0190.Text:
Please listen to me, calmly. 
These creatures that we've been fighting...

STDM_0303103_0200.Text: According to Ieiri, they're former humans. The structure of their bodies was forcibly altered by a Cursed Technique.

STDM_0303103_0210.Text: These guys died from the shock of what happened to their bodies. So, you didn't kill them. Don't get the wrong idea about that.

STDM_0303103_0230.Text: That's easy to say. The weight of those two deaths still feels pretty heavy.

STDM_0303103_0240.Text:
Whatever this thing we're after? 
It disgusts me to the core.

STDM_0303103_0250.Text: This boy can get sincerely angry on behalf of others.

STDM_0303103_0260.Text: Most likely those Residuals were a bluff, left purposely to lure us in.

STDM_0303103_0270.Text: Our foe is quite skilled. It looks like this will take more than moderate effort.

STDM_0303103_0300.Text: Tell me Mahito. What kind of a Curse are you?

STDM_0303103_0320.Text: I'm a Curse that was born from the hatred and fear that people hold deep inside toward others.

STDM_0303201_0020.Text: Jujutsu High doctor, Shoko Ieiri, autopsied the two bodies exorcised on Kinema Cinema's roof and identified them as humans, modified by a Cursed Technique.

STDM_0303201_0030.Text: Reports of disappearances, unnatural deaths, and Residuals from the previous months were used to determine the culprit's hideout location.

STDM_0303201_0040.Text: Kento Nanami went to the culprit's hideout.

STDM_0303201_0050.Text: If you plan to come out, please hurry up and do so.

STDM_0303201_0060.Text: They may be disfigured and beyond saving, but murdering people still makes me sick.

STDM_0303201_0080.Text: I'd be in trouble if Satoru Gojo were here, although the experiment won't really work if you're too weak.

STDM_0303202_0083.Text: I hate putting in overtime if I don't have to. So, let's finish this quickly.

STDM_0303202_0085.Text: Which do you think came first, the soul or the body?

STDM_0303202_0090.Text: Do you think the soul resides in the body, or do you think it's the other way around and the body forms around the soul?

STDM_0303202_0110.Text: Uh-uh. It's the second one. The soul comes first and so exists before the body.

STDM_0303202_0120.Text: The shape of the body is therefore always determined by the shape of the soul.

STDM_0303202_0130.Text: My Technique is to make contact with the soul and then alter its shape.

STDM_0303203_0160.Text:
No wonder you're strong. 
You'll make the perfect test subject. Luck's really on my side.

STDM_0303203_0190.Text: It looks to me like you subconsciously covered your soul somewhat with Cursed Energy.

STDM_0303203_0200.Text: Though, once I touch you a few more times, you will cease to be a human anymore.

STDM_0303301_0010.Text: September 2018, afternoon to evening. Riverside in Kawasaki City, Kanagawa Prefecture.

STDM_0303301_0030.Text: A boy of high school age was spotted in Kinema Cinema's surveillance footage. He was identified as Junpei Yoshino, a first-year at Satozakura High School.

STDM_0303301_0035.Text: Yuji Itadori surveilled him under Kiyotaka Ijichi's supervision.

STDM_0303301_0040.Text: Later, while Yuji Itadori was alone, he came into contact with Junpei Yoshino.

STDM_0303301_0050.Text: After some simple questioning about the incident, Yoshino testified that he hadn't seen a Cursed Spirit inside Kinema Cinema.

STDM_0303301_0060.Text: Itadori then joined Junpei Yoshino and his mother, Nagi Yoshino, in going back to their house.

STDM_0303301_0070.Text: Your mom is really cool and nice.

STDM_0303301_0090.Text: Itadori. You're a Jujutsu Sorcerer, right?

STDM_0303301_0120.Text: Someday you'll have to fight bad Jujutsu Sorcerers, right?

STDM_0303301_0140.Text: If that happens, I still won't want to kill them.

STDM_0303301_0150.Text: I just think if I killed anyone, the very option of killing would then have forced its way into my life.

STDM_0303301_0160.Text: The value of life would become ambiguous. I might start taking the people I care about for granted. And that scares me.

STDM_0303301_0170.Text: People don't have hearts. That idea saved me. It gave me strength.

STDM_0303301_0180.Text: But if killing someone would mean tainting my soul...

STDM_0303301_0205.Text: Wow, I fell asleep. I guess Junpei's friend must have gone home already.

STDM_0303301_0210.Text: Huh, what is this? A finger...?

STDM_0303401_0020.Text: You did well running around, but you're at your limit now, aren't you?

STDM_0303401_0040.Text: I'm going to have to go into overtime.

STDM_0303401_0050.Text:
My Cursed Technique draws a line along the target, using a ratio of 
7:3. Then creates a weak point at exactly that location.

STDM_0303401_0060.Text: This Cursed Technique can affect more than just living creatures as well.

STDM_0303402_0110.Text: At present, the first way I can see to exorcise this Cursed Spirit...

STDM_0303402_0120.Text: ...is to continue damaging him until he runs out of Cursed Energy.

STDM_0303402_0140.Text: The second way is to reduce him to smithereens with a single blow.

STDM_0303403_0160.Text: It's an Expanded Technique that imbues the destroyed target with Cursed Energy!

STDM_0303403_0170.Text:
It's a wide-range attack that probably puts him at risk too... 
So, I guess...

STDM_0303403_0190.Text: I'm going to withdraw. You should get that leg healed up quickly.

STDM_0303403_0200.Text: If we're both still alive, let's meet up again.

STDM_0303501_0010.Text: This is a Cursed Object. Other Curses are drawn to it like a moth to a flame.

STDM_0303501_0020.Text: Yes, but...what was that doing in my house?

STDM_0303501_0030.Text: If you have the money and connections, it's easy to curse someone to death.

STDM_0303501_0040.Text: Can you think of anyone? Anyone who might hold a grudge against you or your mother? Or perhaps...

STDM_0303501_0050.Text: Someone dark and gloomy with plenty of money and free time?

STDM_0303501_0060.Text: I do hope this all plays out the way you believe it will.

STDM_0303501_0070.Text: I think it'll go just fine. The course of events was already set as soon as Junpei landed Sukuna's vessel.

STDM_0303501_0080.Text: I'll cause the two of them to clash and force Yuji Itadori into a pact, giving Sukuna dominance.

STDM_0303501_0100.Text: Without notice, a Veil descended on the school, and over 100 students and teachers inside were attacked by an unidentified Shikigami.

STDM_0303501_0110.Text: It was later determined that the Sorcerer commanding the Shikigami was a student at the school, 17-year-old Junpei Yoshino.

STDM_0303501_0120.Text: Jujutsu High first-year Yuji Itadori, who was acquainted with Yoshino, went in alone to try and resolve the situation.

STDM_0303501_0130.Text: But he failed, due to the intervention of a Cursed Spirit.

STDM_0303501_0140.Text: The Cursed Spirit turned out to be the Special Grade with a patchwork face previously encountered by Grade 1 Sorcerer Kento Nanami.

STDM_0303501_0150.Text: We are calling it "Mahito," which is what Yoshino called it.

STDM_0303501_0160.Text: Yoshino was killed at the scene after being hit by Mahito's Cursed Technique.

STDM_0303501_0190.Text: The next words that spilled from my lips came from so deep within my gut that it nearly made everything I've ever said feel like a lie.

STDM_0303503_0220.Text: You can never beat me, you know?

STDM_0303503_0230.Text: So, swap out already. With Sukuna.

STDM_0303503_0250.Text: You dare to actually touch my soul?

STDM_0303503_0260.Text: Since both of us heartily ridiculed that brat before, I'll allow it this once. There won't be a second time.

STDM_0303503_0270.Text: Don't forget your place, foolish puppet.

STDM_0303503_0280.Text: I'm not swapping out. I already told you. For what you did, I will kill you now.

STDM_0303601_0050.Text: My attacks aren't going to work on him.

STDM_0303601_0070.Text: However, I'll try to keep him from moving around.

STDM_0303601_0080.Text: Then, once we've both got an opening, we'll shower him with blows.

STDM_0303802_0100.Text: Shall we share a little hug? In celebration of our reunion.

STDM_0303602_0110.Text: Notice, just before he changes shape—

STDM_0303603_0150.Text: Yuji Itadori, you really are my natural enemy. I'm going to need you to behave.

STDM_0303603_0180.Text: Look, he's running from them. I knew he couldn't kill humans.

STDM_0303801_0010.Text: Next, I should have him attack you, Sorcerer. You think he'll cry then, too?

STDM_0303801_0020.Text: He's a foolish brat who can't reconcile reality with his ideals.

STDM_0303801_0040.Text: He's right in the process of making that reconciliation. If you want to know what I think, I'd say you're the fool.

STDM_0303802_0060.Text: Ahh... What fresh inspiration this is. Is this...

STDM_0303803_0080.Text: I bet I could do it now.

STDM_0303803_0110.Text: Domain Expansion... Most likely his technique requires touching the target with his palm in its base state.

STDM_0303803_0120.Text: However, in a Domain that guarantees a hit, that would mean that now...

STDM_0303803_0130.Text: I'm literally in the palm of his hand.

STDM_0303803_0140.Text: Right now, I'm just so grateful to you.

STDM_0303803_0150.Text: Save your gratitude. I've already received more than enough of that from others.

STDM_0303803_0170.Text: How was he able to get in?

STDM_0303803_0200.Text: Whether you die, or you die, doesn't matter to me.

STDM_0303803_0210.Text: Aside from him, I truly don't care.

STDM_0303803_0220.Text: Domain Expansion really burns Cursed Energy. It truly is a trump card, a final Technique, and that damn Sukuna just...

STDM_0303803_0230.Text: But this is the critical moment. Squeeze it out! The last of my Cursed Energy!

STDM_0303803_0240.Text: In this moment, I can kill...!

STDM_0303803_0260.Text: Huh? What's this lack of feedback?

STDM_0303803_0290.Text: After that, Mahito escaped through the sewers.

STDM_0303803_0300.Text: After the incident at Satozakura High School, we discovered the corpse of Junpei Yoshino's mother, Nagi, at their home, along with an unsealed finger from Sukuna. A pinky finger from his second left arm.

STDM_0303803_0310.Text: We believe Nagi Yoshino was attacked by Cursed Spirits drawn there by Sukuna's finger. Her remains were completely missing from the waist down.

STDM_0303803_0320.Text: There were no visible or detectable traces of blood found on-site. The victim's body was found lying in her bedroom.

STDM_0303803_0330.Text: When the blanket covering the corpse was pulled down, there were only cold packs and ice bags beneath the torso.

STDM_0303901_0010.Text: I see you have most of your Cursed Energy back.

STDM_0303901_0020.Text: Mahito, you should know you're awfully worn out yourself.

STDM_0303901_0030.Text: Oh, you can tell? Turns out Sukuna and his vessel are my natural enemies.

STDM_0303901_0040.Text: It was great at first, but then it didn't work out.

STDM_0303901_0050.Text: I should've taken a hostage, and then I could have forced him into a pact, am I right?

STDM_0303901_0060.Text: You failed because pacts are only ever placed by oneself on oneself. It's not easy to forge pacts with others because of outside intervention.

STDM_0303901_0070.Text: Jogo, touching Sukuna made me realize that we should probably proceed with Geto's plan for now.

STDM_0303901_0090.Text: You mean gather all the fingers and offer them to Sukuna, huh?

STDM_0303901_0100.Text: Even if that means we all get wiped out in the process?

STDM_0303901_0110.Text: Very well then. I sure don't intend to be the one left laughing like a lunatic in the wasteland a century from now. As long as Curses exist as people, that's all that matters.

STDM_0303901_0130.Text: But before that, how about some warm-up exercises? You must be feeling out of shape, right, Jogo?

STDM_0303901_0140.Text: Very well then, but I'm already in perfect shape.

STDM_0303902_0160.Text: This'll be little more than a formality.

STDM_0303903_0170.Text: I'm glad you're both feeling lively. Looks like you'll be up to putting the plan into operation.

STDM_0303903_0180.Text: Good. But first, we need to go retrieve the six fingers from Jujutsu High.

STDM_0303903_0190.Text: Do we have to? I thought the Sorcerers were only keeping Yuji Itadori around so that he can swallow Sukuna's fingers. If we leave him alone, he'll still eat them.

STDM_0303903_0200.Text: The higher-ups at Jujutsu High are still trying to calculate Yuji Itadori's strength as a vessel.

STDM_0303903_0210.Text: They want to see just how many fingers he can take.

STDM_0303903_0220.Text: They want to gather all the fingers and then have him consume them, with just one exception.

STDM_0303903_0230.Text: So, into the tiger's den we go, huh? Then just how do you think we ought to proceed?

STDM_0303903_0240.Text: Already started. My first move was allowing Jujutsu High to retrieve the fingers we had.

STDM_0304001_0010.Text: I've bought winter clothes and boots, so now I just need a bag.

STDM_0304001_0020.Text: Mini-bags with the handle on top are trendy at the moment. Oh yeah, I wanted that one by one of my favorite designers, the limited edition.

STDM_0304001_0030.Text: Yes! It's still in stock! I'm buying this!

STDM_0304001_0040.Text: If I'd got here 5 minutes earlier... Missing the last one is too much to bear.

STDM_0304001_0050.Text: This feeling of missing out after I was set on buying it, it's terrible!

STDM_0304001_0060.Text: I want to hit something! Why is it only times like this when Fushiguro and the others aren't around?

STDM_0304001_0090.Text: Even on your day off, you're still on special training, Maki.

STDM_0304001_0110.Text: Maybe I should move my body too!

STDM_0304002_0140.Text: I won't go easy on you, Maki.

STDM_0304002_0150.Text: Of course! Come at me like you mean it!

STDM_0304101_0010.Text: Finally, I got my work done within the time with no trouble.

STDM_0304101_0020.Text: Tomorrow's a rare holiday. Let's take it easy at home.

STDM_0304101_0040.Text: There's that book I've been reading...

STDM_0304101_0060.Text: You're ignoring me Nanami. Should I shout louder?

STDM_0304101_0080.Text:
Would you cut it out?
It's after-hours already. Don't talk to me.

STDM_0304101_0090.Text: There's something I need to ask of you...

STDM_0304101_0110.Text: It's a really important request! Just listen to what I have to say.

STDM_0304101_0130.Text: I really hope you can help!

STDM_0304101_0140.Text: As an adult, I'm duty bound to keep my mind and body in good condition.

STDM_0304101_0150.Text: If you win, I'll give up.

STDM_0304101_0160.Text: There's nobody who can win against you.

STDM_0304102_0170.Text: Would you listen to a request from your senior?

STDM_0304102_0180.Text: Would you listen to a request from your junior?

STDM_0304102_0190.Text: Come on, I really need a responsible, grown-up person like you to take care of this one.

STDM_0304102_0200.Text: I'm an adult who knows how to say "No."

STDM_0304103_0220.Text: Even if you sulk, you can't have what you can't have. Today I'm going home on time, whatever happens.

STDM_0304103_0230.Text: Well, never mind, I'll ask someone else.

STDM_0304103_0250.Text: I feel sorry for that "someone else," but an adult sticks to his decisions.

STDM_0304201_0010.Text: Hey, Megumi, Toge, I need to ask you a favor, okay?

STDM_0304201_0040.Text: There's some new Panda merch coming out at Ueno Zoo!

STDM_0304201_0060.Text: I don't mind, but are you okay with being among ordinary people, Panda?

STDM_0304201_0070.Text: It's the zoo, so people'll probably just assume I'm a guy in a suit.

STDM_0304201_0100.Text: They looked surprisingly well groomed, huh?

STDM_0304201_0140.Text: What's up with Panda? He's been quiet for a while.

STDM_0304201_0160.Text: Why are you getting so excited by pandas when you see me all the time!

STDM_0304202_0170.Text: What's got you so riled up?

STDM_0304203_0210.Text: I'm a hundred times cuter than them! And I smell better too, don't I?

STDM_0304301_0030.Text: I know how this goes, and it's not going to be good.

STDM_0304301_0040.Text: I need to ask a favor, since the guy I was counting on refused.

STDM_0304301_0060.Text: I'll help you with your special training, so please.

STDM_0304301_0070.Text: Nobara! Get ready! We're gonna claw his smug face off.

STDM_0304302_0090.Text: You should listen when your elders ask something.

STDM_0304302_0110.Text: Even without knowing what this "favor" is, my gut just says "no."

STDM_0304303_0130.Text: Why are you guys all so cold to me?

STDM_0304303_0140.Text: Because you're always such a pain!

STDM_0304303_0145.Text: Because you're always such a pain!

STDM_0404401_0010.Text: Nanami. Does Yuji know about that finger in Junpei Yoshino's...

STDM_0404401_0020.Text: I haven't told him. Knowing Yuji, he'd just feel unnecessarily responsible.

STDM_0404401_0030.Text: I'm glad I left you in charge of him.

STDM_0404401_0050.Text: I submitted it to the higher-ups, of course. If I gave it to you, you'd have already fed it to Itadori.

STDM_0404401_0070.Text: Let's hurry up. I wanna go see everyone.

STDM_0404401_0080.Text: Yuji. What are you thinking? After all this time, you can just show up like nothing happened?

STDM_0404401_0090.Text: So we have to make it a surprise.

STDM_0404401_0100.Text: So cool! So, what's my job in this? Tell me, what do I have to do here?

STDM_0404401_0110.Text: You don't have to do anything, Yuji. You just do exactly as I say and go with the flow.

STDM_0404401_0120.Text: It'll be a big enough surprise for them just to see he's alive.

STDM_0404401_0140.Text: Okay, everybody from Kyoto gets this tribal protective charm doll...

STDM_0404401_0150.Text: Now, for all you Tokyo peeps, I have this. Ta-da.

STDM_0404401_0170.Text: Hey! What the hell? What kind of a reaction is this?

STDM_0404401_0180.Text: They don't seem happy to see me at all.

STDM_0404401_0190.Text: Sukuna's vessel lives?! Just who is behind this outrage?

STDM_0404501_0010.Text: The Tokyo-Kyoto Sister School Exchange Event will be held over two days. The first day is a group battle—exorcism race.

STDM_0404501_0020.Text: The first team to exorcise the second-grade Cursed Spirit released in the designated area wins.

STDM_0404501_0030.Text: Several third grade and lower Cursed Spirits will be released into the designated area as well. If a winner is not decided by sundown...

STDM_0404501_0040.Text: Then the team that exorcises the most wins. There are absolutely no other rules.

STDM_0404501_0050.Text: So this is the first-year who died?

STDM_0404501_0100.Text: Inumaki is a Cursed Speech user.

STDM_0404501_0110.Text: His speech amplifies the power and compulsion of words. He limits his vocabulary to keep others safe.

STDM_0404501_0120.Text: So, if he told someone to go die, they'd do it? Awesome.

STDM_0404501_0140.Text: Using powerful words can produce massive feedback. Worst case, it could affect him as well.

STDM_0404501_0150.Text: Limiting his vocabulary is a way for Toge to protect himself and others.

STDM_0404501_0160.Text:
So, what's our new strategy? 
Our group battle plan is what we expected...

STDM_0404501_0170.Text: But we have another member now. Should we change strategies? We don't have much time.

STDM_0404501_0190.Text: Well, I think that'll depend on Yuji. What are your specialties?

STDM_0404501_0210.Text: We're already pretty well set for all of that.

STDM_0404501_0220.Text: I don't know what he's been doing, since he's been dead for a while now...

STDM_0404501_0230.Text: But I can say this much: if we all fought him and he didn't use Cursed Energy...

STDM_0404501_0250.Text: Megumi's saying that, even after fighting Todo. That makes it pretty convincing.

STDM_0404501_0270.Text: All right all of you, the three first-years and we second-years are going to have a training fight.

STDM_0404501_0280.Text: Now?! We don't have time for this...

STDM_0404501_0300.Text: I'd certainly like to check out Yuji's ability before the Exchange Event.

STDM_0404502_0330.Text: I've been working on my skills. You can put your trust in me.

STDM_0404502_0340.Text: Looks like you weren't just busy being dead.

STDM_0404502_0370.Text: Better get on with it, or the Exchange Event will start without us.

STDM_0404503_0390.Text: Looks like you're as good as Megumi said.

STDM_0404503_0430.Text: As for our strategy for the Exchange Event, Todo is our biggest challenge.

STDM_0404503_0440.Text: Todo is a monster. The worst possible outcome would be that we all face him, and we all get wiped out.

STDM_0404503_0450.Text: So, our plan was to leave one of us, not sure who, either Panda or Megumi behind, to deal with him.

STDM_0404503_0460.Text: So now, Itadori, we'll leave that role to you.

STDM_0404503_0480.Text: You don't have to beat him. Just try to hold out and buy us some time.

STDM_0404503_0490.Text: I'll play along if you want me to.

STDM_0404601_0020.Text: Sukuna's vessel is not an actual person. So the act will go unquestioned. Without a doubt, the entire event will be seen as an accident.

STDM_0404601_0030.Text: This sucks. Do what you want.
