STDM_0404601_0040.Text: So, what do we do now? How are we going to carry out the game plan with Todo acting like that?

STDM_0404601_0050.Text: While he goes berserk, the rest of us can just keep our efforts focused on the game.

STDM_0404601_0060.Text: Don't forget we have direct orders to kill Yuji Itadori.

STDM_0404601_0070.Text: Honestly, I doubt Todo will actually kill him, but he is capable of it.

STDM_0404601_0080.Text: Then we'll need to assign someone to keep an eye on Todo and deliver the final blow to Yuji Itadori.

STDM_0404601_0090.Text: Allowing a half-wit like Yuji Itadori to exist as a Sorcerer at this school is a serious problem.

STDM_0404601_0100.Text: We will all attack Itadori together.

STDM_0404601_0110.Text: Well then, what did you want?

STDM_0404601_0120.Text: Someone's working with a Curse or a Curse user here.

STDM_0404601_0130.Text: Impossible! A Curse user's one thing, but working with Curses?

STDM_0404601_0140.Text: And yet a lot of them on that level have been popping up lately.

STDM_0404601_0150.Text: They might think they're just working with a Curse user...

STDM_0404601_0160.Text: But you need to investigate everyone at Kyoto.

STDM_0404601_0210.Text: But it's true that I'm okay. In fact, because of it, I really don't want to lose.

STDM_0404601_0230.Text: Because I don't want to lose either.

STDM_0404601_0260.Text: Who said you could go first?

STDM_0404701_0010.Text: Now let the Sister-School Exchange Event...

STDM_0404701_0030.Text: At the prearranged time, we'll split into the Megumi squad and the Panda squad.

STDM_0404701_0040.Text: After that, it's on you, Yuji.

STDM_0404701_0080.Text: Now, come at me, all at once.

STDM_0404702_0100.Text: I'll return the favor. Act like your life's at stake.

STDM_0404702_0110.Text: Sorry, but I'm not losing to anyone.

STDM_0404703_0140.Text: All right, Yuji Itadori, I have one question that I need to ask you.

STDM_0404703_0150.Text: What kind of woman is your type?

STDM_0404703_0160.Text: You want to know my type? Why would you be asking me that now?

STDM_0404703_0170.Text: Never mind why. I'm just evaluating you.

STDM_0404703_0180.Text: Well, I don't get why it's important, but I guess if I had to say...

STDM_0404703_0190.Text: I like a tall woman with a nice big ass...

STDM_0404703_0220.Text: So, you never lost to anyone in your hometown, huh?

STDM_0404703_0230.Text: You and I were destined to be best friends like we are.

STDM_0404703_0240.Text: Hold on, you just learned my name.

STDM_0404703_0270.Text: Why does it feel like these guys...

STDM_0404703_0280.Text: are actually trying to kill me?

STDM_0404703_0300.Text: Did Itadori and I just switch places?

STDM_0404703_0310.Text: Didn't I tell you I'd kill you if you interfered with me?

STDM_0404703_0320.Text: Was that switch Itadori's Technique, or was it Todo's?

STDM_0404703_0350.Text: I'd say all that depends on Itadori.

STDM_0404703_0360.Text: It's lucky for you, I'm not an inconsiderate type who'd ever hold back against his best friend in a fight.

STDM_0404801_0010.Text: Tokyo-Kyoto Sister School Exchange Event, team battle. The Tokyo and Kyoto schools closed in on each other.

STDM_0404801_0030.Text: They then faced off as follows:

STDM_0404801_0100.Text: His raw strength is greater than mine, despite his smaller body.

STDM_0404801_0110.Text:
Which is why his blows are still effective with so little Cursed Energy. 
And because there's so little of that it's hard to read his movements.

STDM_0404801_0120.Text: But the way his Cursed Energy hits after a time lag... Well that is just... It's just...

STDM_0404801_0140.Text: Listen, my friend, that time-lagged Cursed Energy blast...

STDM_0404801_0150.Text: That is a bad habit you've developed.

STDM_0404801_0170.Text: If you rely on just that one trick, you'll never defeat me.

STDM_0404801_0180.Text: And if you're satisfied staying on that level, sadly you and I can't possibly stay best friends.

STDM_0404801_0200.Text: I don't know. I don't care about that.

STDM_0404801_0230.Text: That's more like it, my new best friend!

STDM_0404803_0240.Text: Your Divergent Fist is created by your Cursed Energy lagging slightly behind your superhuman physical prowess, when normally there would be no lag at all.

STDM_0404803_0250.Text: It's a tricky move. Your average Sorcerer wouldn't know what happened, and they'd be left disoriented.

STDM_0404803_0260.Text: It has lots of force too. Enough for opponents on that level at least.

STDM_0404803_0270.Text: If that's so, why is your Cursed Energy lagging?

STDM_0404803_0280.Text: I know why. It's because you're channeling it.

STDM_0404803_0290.Text: They say it flows from the navel to the chest. Then to the shoulders, arms, and finally the fists.

STDM_0404803_0300.Text: But this view of the body as individual parts is what delays Cursed Energy.

STDM_0404803_0310.Text: Would you say Sorcerers think using their guts?

STDM_0404803_0320.Text: Do we express anger with our heads? Now listen to me, Itadori.

STDM_0404803_0330.Text: We exist in this world with our entire mind, body, and soul as a whole.

STDM_0404803_0340.Text: It's such a given that no one even thinks about it.

STDM_0404803_0370.Text: Humph. Good. Then no more words are needed.

STDM_0404803_0390.Text: I'll guide you with my full strength.

STDM_0404901_0010.Text: The results of the battles between the Tokyo and Kyoto students are as follows.

STDM_0404901_0020.Text: Ultimate Mechamaru defeated by the damage from Panda's Drumming Beat.

STDM_0404901_0030.Text: Nobara Kugisaki defeated by being rendered unconscious by Mai Zen'in's rubber bullet.

STDM_0404901_0040.Text: Mai Zen'in defeated by surrendering to Maki Zen'in.

STDM_0404901_0050.Text: Kasumi Miwa defeated by being put to sleep by Toge Inumaki's Cursed Speech.

STDM_0404903_0150.Text: During the Exchange Event team battle, an unregistered Special Grade Cursed Spirit exorcised all of the Grade 2, Grade 3, and lower Cursed Spirits in the designated area.

STDM_0404903_0160.Text: As a result, the Exchange Event was suspended.

STDM_0404903_0170.Text: Special Grade Jujutsu Sorcerer Satoru Gojo, semi-first-grade Sorcerer Utahime Iori, and Kyoto Jujutsu High School principal Yoshinobu Gakuganji headed into the designated area to retrieve the students.

STDM_0404903_0180.Text: As they were doing so, an intruder lowered a Veil over the area.

STDM_0404903_0190.Text: The Veil had been designed to allow anyone to go in and out freely, with the exception of Satoru Gojo.

STDM_0404903_0200.Text: Expecting that the intruder would prove to be a Curse user of great power, Utahime Iori and Yoshinobu Gakuganji went to protect the students.

STDM_0405001_0010.Text: The unregistered Special Grade Cursed Spirit clashed with third-year Noritoshi Kamo, second-year Toge Inumaki, and first-year Megumi Fushiguro.

STDM_0405001_0020.Text: Judging by its appearance, it was judged likely to be affiliated with the Cursed Spirits that attacked Satoru Gojo.

STDM_0405001_0030.Text: A Cursed Spirit at Jujutsu High? Just who produced this Veil?

STDM_0405001_0040.Text: Probably the Curse user who's working with it.

STDM_0405001_0050.Text: Hmm? Do you know something about this?

STDM_0405001_0060.Text: Yes, I think it's the Special Grade Cursed Spirit that attacked Gojo a while ago. Its appearance matches the report.

STDM_0405001_0080.Text: You're right. Let's call Gojo and let him know.

STDM_0405001_0090.Text: Our enemy might use a Domain. I'm thinking we should retreat and join Gojo—

STDM_0405001_0100.Text: Dammit, do we have to fight?

STDM_0405003_0160.Text: What is this?! I can't tell what it's saying by the sound, but I somehow understand its meaning.

STDM_0405003_0170.Text: I merely wish to protect this planet, that's all.

STDM_0405003_0180.Text:
It's a Curse spouting nonsense.
Don't listen.

STDM_0405003_0190.Text: This is on a whole different level than lower-grade Cursed Spirits.

STDM_0405003_0200.Text: The forests, the oceans, and the sky, all weep so vehemently that I can no longer stand it. It's impossible to coexist with humans any longer.

STDM_0405003_0210.Text: This planet can shine blue once more, given a bit of time.

STDM_0405101_0010.Text: The Special Grade Cursed Spirit wounded Noritoshi Kamo and Toge Inumaki in combat.

STDM_0405101_0020.Text: Jujutsu High second-year Maki Zen'in was nearby and rushed to their aid.

STDM_0405101_0030.Text: Combat revealed that the plants, which grow out from the orbital region of the Special Grade Cursed Spirit, are a weak point.

STDM_0405101_0040.Text: Maki Zen'in wielded the Special Grade Cursed Tool: Playful Cloud.

STDM_0405101_0060.Text: Though, I have to say using this one feels disgusting.

STDM_0405102_0100.Text: Indeed. That is a good weapon.

STDM_0405103_0120.Text:
Don't ever let me use that three-piece staff again. 
It's too hard.

STDM_0405103_0160.Text: Damn it. All because I screwed up!

STDM_0405103_0170.Text: Jujutsu Sorcerers are so extraordinarily compassionate. As a result, an opening is always created when their ally is injured.

STDM_0405103_0180.Text: I have to wring out that Cursed Energy, even if it rips my stomach open!

STDM_0405103_0190.Text:
I'm not like everyone else.
I choose who I protect.
I shoulder the least responsibility. Therefore...

STDM_0405103_0200.Text: I am simply not allowed to fall before anyone else.

STDM_0405103_0220.Text: We did it, our job here is done. It's time to tag out.

STDM_0405103_0230.Text: All right friend, you good to go?

STDM_0405201_0010.Text: The Special Grade Cursed Spirit seriously wounded Maki Zen'in and Megumi Fushiguro in combat.

STDM_0405201_0020.Text: Having learned their location from Momo Nishimiya, Jujutsu High third-year Aoi Todo and first-year Yuji Itadori rushed to rescue them.

STDM_0405201_0030.Text: I'm not going to lift a finger to help you. You know that right, Itadori?

STDM_0405201_0040.Text: Not until you land a Black Flash.

STDM_0405201_0050.Text: If you can't land a Black Flash, then I'll just watch you die! No matter what happens to you. Got that?

STDM_0405201_0070.Text: Ah... Sukuna's vessel and...who is that man?

STDM_0405201_0080.Text: He's strangely bold. I see he must have quite the Technique.

STDM_0405201_0100.Text: You can talk? That's interesting. In that case, there's something I want to ask you.

STDM_0405201_0110.Text: Are you connected with a humanoid Cursed Spirit with a patchwork face?

STDM_0405201_0130.Text: If I say that I am?

STDM_0405201_0150.Text: Anger is a trigger for Sorcerers, and it can work for you both ways.

STDM_0405201_0160.Text: A Sorcerer can be taken down in a fight simply because he accidentally enraged his foe.

STDM_0405201_0170.Text: And the opposite is also true. Sometimes they lose because their own anger disrupts their Cursed Energy to the point that they can't exercise their abilities.

STDM_0405201_0180.Text: Your friend has gotten hurt, and what's even worse than that, they've rained on your honeymoon with me, your new best friend.

STDM_0405201_0190.Text: So, take it from me, I can absolutely understand why you're boiling with rage.

STDM_0405201_0200.Text: But all that rage is too much for you. So, put it away for now.

STDM_0405201_0210.Text: So how do you feel? You clearheaded now?

STDM_0405201_0230.Text: Thank you for that, my new best friend!

STDM_0405202_0250.Text: Black Flash. It's a distortion of space born from the impact of Cursed Energy delivered within a trillionth of a second of a blow.

STDM_0405202_0260.Text: It delivers 2.5 times the force of a normal strike. There are no Sorcerers who can consistently use Black Flash.

STDM_0405202_0280.Text: Between those who have experienced Black Flash and those who have not, their distance from the core of Cursed Energy is like the distance of heaven from earth.

STDM_0405301_0010.Text: Black Flash? So I did that?

STDM_0405301_0020.Text: What is this? This is my Cursed Energy I'm sensing, isn't it?

STDM_0405301_0030.Text: Now you understand the taste of Cursed Energy.

STDM_0405301_0050.Text: Now, you can become truly strong.

STDM_0405301_0060.Text: I had been told that Sukuna's vessel was immature as a Sorcerer. But he and this mysterious man...

STDM_0405301_0070.Text: Something about them is different from the other masses.

STDM_0405302_0073.Text: Now, what do you say you and I get cooking?

STDM_0405302_0075.Text: It would seem that perhaps I should take you two somewhat seriously.

STDM_0405303_0120.Text: Then it's time to unleash my Technique.

STDM_0405401_0010.Text: Look, in our current situation, I don't have time to explain my Technique to you.

STDM_0405401_0020.Text: There's really only one piece of advice I can give you.

STDM_0405401_0060.Text: So, even accounting for unexpected situations, my 530,000 IQ mental CPU produces only one, inescapable conclusion...

STDM_0405401_0090.Text: Because you're here. And you're with me.

STDM_0405402_0100.Text: I see. It's simple, and therefore, that's a troubling Technique you have.

STDM_0405402_0110.Text: Yes. It's simply swapping my position for that and my opponents. The Boogie Woogie!

STDM_0405402_0130.Text: I will end this before it can adapt.

STDM_0405403_0140.Text: I was hoping I wouldn't have to use this.

STDM_0405403_0160.Text: Stay back, brother. Its Cursed Energy output is strong.

STDM_0405403_0170.Text: Yes, but it will be easy to avoid with your Technique. So, what shall I do? Domain Exp—

STDM_0405403_0180.Text: Special Grade Curses are adept at escaping. It's some distance away from Yuji. Oh well.

STDM_0405403_0190.Text: Guess I can play a little rough.

STDM_0405403_0220.Text: I'm withdrawing. I'm not arrogant enough to think I can face Satoru Gojo.

STDM_0405403_0240.Text: What were you all trying to do here anyway?

STDM_0405403_0260.Text: Why are you stopping me, Todo?

STDM_0405403_0275.Text: Or you'll get caught in it.

STDM_0405403_0290.Text: He's just as nonstandard as ever.

STDM_0405403_0300.Text: And now we can't tell if the Special Grade was exorcised or not.

STDM_0405403_0310.Text: That should settle everything! Or maybe it won't.

STDM_0405403_0320.Text: Special Grade Sorcerer Satoru Gojo succeeded in driving out the unregistered Special Grade Cursed Spirit which attacked Jujutsu High.

STDM_0405403_0330.Text: But someone infiltrated the Jujutsu High cursed warehouse,

STDM_0405403_0340.Text: and stole the six of Sukuna's fingers and the Death Painting Wombs, one through three, which were stored there.

STDM_0405403_0350.Text: You got seriously messed up, Hanami.

STDM_0405403_0360.Text: But things went fine for me because you distracted them.

STDM_0405403_0370.Text: Come on, wake up. Let's go.

STDM_0405403_0390.Text: Trying to put the brakes on my hostility is incredibly stressful.

STDM_0405403_0400.Text: You're sounding more like a Curse every day, Hanami.

STDM_0405501_0020.Text: Three second-grade Sorcerers, one semi-first-grade Sorcerer, five supervisors, and two guards.

STDM_0405501_0030.Text: They were all on standby at the school, and all of them were there working separately from Gojo and Principal Yaga.

STDM_0405501_0040.Text: Based on the Residuals, we're nearly certain it was the work of the same Cursed Spirit that Nanami encountered before.

STDM_0405501_0050.Text: Well, for the time being, at least our students are all safe.

STDM_0405501_0060.Text: But obviously, the Exchange Event will have to be canceled.

STDM_0405501_0070.Text: Hold on. Since when is that a decision we get to make?

STDM_0405501_0090.Text: The second day of the Exchange Event, which was temporarily suspended due to the attack by the Special Grade Cursed Spirit, was held.

STDM_0405501_0100.Text: Individual battles were due to take place, but the contest was changed to baseball as the result of a lottery draw.

STDM_0405501_0110.Text: The match results are as follows:

STDM_0405501_0120.Text: Sister-School Exchange Event: Day 2, baseball match.

STDM_0405501_0130.Text: Tokyo 2-0 Kyoto. The winner of the 30th Exchange Event is the Tokyo School.

STDM_0405601_0005.Text: A few days after the Exchange Event...

STDM_0405601_0010.Text: This is a little sudden, but there will be a joint training session for first and second-years.

STDM_0405601_0020.Text: Weren't we going to have regular classes?

STDM_0405601_0050.Text: Nobara and Maki vs. Toge and Panda!

STDM_0405601_0080.Text: You know we're used to fighting as a pair, Satoru.

STDM_0405601_0100.Text: It's fine! They'll hurt you if you're not careful.

STDM_0405602_0140.Text: Commentary by none other than the Special Grade Jujutsu Sorcerer, Satoru Gojo.

STDM_0405602_0150.Text: Oh great, here he goes again.

STDM_0405602_0160.Text: Just ignore it as usual and go ahead.

STDM_0405602_0170.Text: Toge and Panda have been teaming up since their first year, so they should be on the same wavelength.

STDM_0405602_0180.Text: On the other hand, Maki and Nobara are from different years and lack experience working together. How good will their teamwork be?

STDM_0405602_0190.Text: A bruising attack right off the bat! That was extremely well executed.

STDM_0405602_0200.Text: A fierce blow. That had to hurt!

STDM_0405602_0210.Text: Here's one of their strongest moves! Will it change the course of the match?

STDM_0405602_0220.Text: Only a well-coordinated pair could pull off that move off! That'll leave a mark!

STDM_0405602_0250.Text: Looking back on the match so far...

STDM_0405602_0260.Text: What we're seeing here shows the importance of steadily landing one attack after another.

STDM_0405602_0270.Text: The Toge-Panda team is under pressure! Is Toge's throat accumulating damage?

STDM_0405602_0280.Text: The Toge-Panda team is in a pinch here. Has their energy run out?

STDM_0405602_0290.Text: The Nobara-Maki team is backed into a corner. Are they about to lose?

STDM_0405602_0300.Text: The Nobara-Maki team is fading. Are they tiring under their opponents' onslaught?

STDM_0405602_0310.Text: Not much time left! What's it going to take to win here?

STDM_0405603_0330.Text: But that could have gone either way.

STDM_0405603_0340.Text: Now you two have to buy us some drinks.

STDM_0405603_0350.Text: I didn't hear anything about that.

STDM_0405603_0360.Text: Naturally, the losers do what the winners say.

STDM_0405603_0380.Text: Stop grumbling and get me a soda. Nobara, what would you like?

STDM_0405701_0010.Text: I, too, have learned to feel the joy of battle, Mahito.

STDM_0405701_0030.Text: My wounds from that fight have healed.

STDM_0405701_0040.Text: Would you mind sparring with me a little?

STDM_0405703_0100.Text: You're moving now like you're enjoying yourself.

STDM_0405703_0110.Text: You're as strong as I thought, Hanami.

STDM_0405703_0130.Text: This has been beneficial for me too. Thank you.

STDM_0405801_0060.Text: We haven't fought since that time.

STDM_0405801_0070.Text: As payback for back then, I'm going to defeat you now.

STDM_0405802_0071.Text: The word "defeat" has no place in my mind!

STDM_0405802_0072.Text: I really don't want to lose.

STDM_0405802_0073.Text: I don't want to lose either.

STDM_0405802_0074.Text: Hehe. In that case, let's win.

STDM_0405802_0080.Text: All right then, I'll get back to commentating.

STDM_0405802_0100.Text: Let him continue til he gets bored.

STDM_0405802_0110.Text: Yuji's Divergent Fist brings the pain!

STDM_0405802_0130.Text: Oh dear, Aoi! Is taking on two opponents proving too much to handle?

STDM_0405803_0150.Text: You two will get stronger. I guarantee it.

STDM_0405803_0180.Text: What did he come here for?

STDM_0405803_0200.Text: And that brings this training to a close.

STDM_0505901_0010.Text: Three male non-Sorcerers have been murdered by a Cursed Spirit in very similar conditions.

STDM_0505901_0020.Text: We inspected Residuals at the scene but couldn't tell whether the same Cursed Spirit was the culprit in all three cases.

STDM_0505901_0030.Text: The dates and locations of the deaths differ, but the victims had been at the same junior high school for two years.

STDM_0505901_0040.Text: Jujutsu High first-years Yuji Itadori, Megumi Fushiguro, and Nobara Kugisaki were dispatched to investigate.

STDM_0505901_0060.Text: A visit had been arranged with Morishita, an acquaintance of the three victims, but he was found murdered at his home in the same way.

STDM_0505901_0070.Text: Saitama Urami East Junior High, Saitama Prefecture. We gained information from a worker at the school, Mr. Takeda, and two current students.

STDM_0505901_0080.Text: Apparently the four victims went together once to visit Yasohachi Bridge, once known to the local people as a haunted location,

STDM_0505901_0085.Text: and were found there the next morning, unconscious.

STDM_0505901_0090.Text: As a matter of fact, I've been to that bridge.

STDM_0505901_0100.Text: There wasn't anything strange at the time.

STDM_0505901_0110.Text: We still have to go and check it out though.

STDM_0505901_0120.Text: Hey, sorry to ask you this when you just woke up,

STDM_0505901_0130.Text: but could you go run a little errand for me?

STDM_0505901_0140.Text: 2018, Yasohachi Bridge over Koinokuchi Canyon, Saitama City, Saitama Prefecture.

STDM_0505901_0143.Text: Yuji Itadori, Nobara Kugisaki, and Megumi Fushiguro investigated the top of Yasohachi Bridge, but found nothing.

STDM_0505901_0150.Text: However, they spoke to Fujinuma, one of Fushiguro's classmates, and learned that she had been under the bridge along with Tsumiki Fushiguro and one other person.

STDM_0505901_0160.Text: Fushiguro spoke with Kiyotaka Ijichi, and requested that his sister be assigned protection. He was also informed that the Curse could be a higher grade than expected, and was advised to withdraw.

STDM_0505901_0170.Text: Under the Yasohachi Bridge over Koinokuchi Canyon, Saitama City, Saitama Prefecture.

STDM_0505901_0180.Text: Megumi Fushiguro headed to the bridge alone after learning from Supervisor Akari Nitta about the tests of courage that had been held there. Yuji Itadori and Nobara Kugisaki followed him secretly.

STDM_0505901_0190.Text: If you didn't notice us until now, you're seriously lost in space.

STDM_0505901_0200.Text: We're not saying you have to tell us everything, but come on...

STDM_0505901_0230.Text: The Curse of the Yasohachi Bridge only appears to its victims...

STDM_0505901_0240.Text: Since she can't communicate herself, I have no idea when she'll be killed by the Curse.

STDM_0505901_0250.Text: So, I want to exorcise it right away.

STDM_0505901_0260.Text: But now that our mission's danger level has increased...

STDM_0505901_0270.Text: Okay, okay, geez, we get it now.

STDM_0505901_0280.Text: You should have just told us all that from the start.

STDM_0506001_0010.Text: The Cursed Spirit is within its barrier, so the procedure is important.

STDM_0506001_0020.Text: You go at night, from underneath. And one more thing.

STDM_0506001_0025.Text: At the bottom of the canyon, there might be a river.

STDM_0506001_0030.Text: Crossing a river or other border, acts that symbolize crossing over to the afterlife, these carry important meanings in Sorcery.

STDM_0506001_0070.Text: What's this? Someone beat me here?

STDM_0506001_0110.Text: Then why don't you two focus on that first one.

STDM_0506002_0130.Text: Is that so? You're going to play with me now, are you?

STDM_0506002_0140.Text: What's in that blood he spits out? Some kind of poison?

STDM_0506002_0150.Text: What's this? You're too strong. That's not very much fun at all.

STDM_0506003_0180.Text: Tsk. How many of them are there?

STDM_0506003_0190.Text: I guess we just keep going like it's whack-a-mole, huh?

STDM_0506003_0200.Text: Yeah, keep going. Keep on exorcising them.

STDM_0506003_0260.Text: Oh hey, it's my older brother.

STDM_0506003_0300.Text: All right, but if things go bad here, then you follow us and get out.

STDM_0506101_0020.Text: I didn't realize you were a woman. But you are, sorry.

STDM_0506103_0050.Text: We brothers were tasked with a certain errand, you see.

STDM_0506103_0060.Text: But killing Jujutsu Sorcerers isn't part of that arrangement.

STDM_0506103_0070.Text: So, if you withdraw, we'll let you escape, young woman.

STDM_0506103_0090.Text: I presumed you were on the same errand.

STDM_0506103_0100.Text: Our only objective here, is to get Sukuna’s finger and return it to where it belongs.

STDM_0506201_0030.Text: Huh, and that's the last of them.

STDM_0506201_0040.Text: Why did it just now start killing the humans it had marked?

STDM_0506201_0050.Text: The first one was killed back in June.

STDM_0506201_0080.Text: Some have a presence that's too overwhelming.

STDM_0506201_0100.Text: Some have already been absorbed by a Cursed Spirit.

STDM_0506201_0120.Text: This one looks the same as the one from the juvenile detention center, but it's probably several degrees stronger!

STDM_0506202_0190.Text: This is unusual. You rarely ask me to train you, Megumi.

STDM_0506202_0200.Text: Well, I guess beggars can't be choosers.

STDM_0506202_0210.Text: Listen, Megumi. I think you have just as much ability and potential as Yuji does.

STDM_0506202_0220.Text: The only thing holding you back is your mindset.

STDM_0506202_0230.Text: Megumi, you don't know how to bring out your best, do you?

STDM_0506202_0250.Text: Are you saying I haven't been giving it my best?

STDM_0506202_0260.Text: I'm not saying you haven't, I'm saying you can't.

STDM_0506202_0270.Text: For example, in the ball game.

STDM_0506202_0280.Text: Why did you lay down that sacrifice bunt?

STDM_0506202_0290.Text: Was it to advance the runner, even though it meant that you'd be out? That is good team play.

STDM_0506202_0300.Text: But Jujutsu Sorcery is an individual sport.

STDM_0506202_0310.Text: Isn't working with the other Sorcerers important?

STDM_0506202_0320.Text: Of course. But no matter how many allies you have around you,

STDM_0506202_0330.Text: when you die, you'll be alone.

STDM_0506203_0360.Text: You can only piece together undervalued data on yourself and others.

STDM_0506203_0370.Text: You can't imagine a stronger future version of yourself.

STDM_0506203_0380.Text: Maybe that's because of your trump card. You believe that in the worst case, you can resolve everything at the cost of your life.

STDM_0506203_0390.Text: And at that point, forget about beating me. You'll never even measure up to Nanami.

STDM_0506203_0400.Text: Dying to win and risking death to win are completely different, Megumi.

STDM_0506203_0410.Text: Give it your best. Be greedier.

STDM_0506301_0010.Text: How many seconds was I unconscious? My Divine Dog's destroyed. No, the Technique was released.

STDM_0506301_0020.Text: So, I guess, this is it for me.

STDM_0506301_0030.Text: Sacred Treasure, Swing and Ring, Ring...

STDM_0506301_0040.Text: Kind of a waste of your talents.

STDM_0506301_0080.Text: Imagine a future version of myself who's freely surpassed my limits.

STDM_0506303_0100.Text: I'm tired... And now for the other guys, where'd they go?

STDM_0506303_0120.Text: Now I just have to tell Itadori the news about Sukuna's finger.

STDM_0506303_0140.Text: Jujutsu High first-year Megumi Fushiguro encountered a Special Grade Cursed Spirit which had ingested Sukuna's finger, and succeeded in exorcising it alone.

STDM_0506401_0020.Text: Actually, on second thought, please forget everything I just said.

STDM_0506401_0030.Text: Damn, he's going after Sukuna's finger!

STDM_0506401_0040.Text: Hold it right there. Do you think you can mock me, dancing around like that, and still get away?

STDM_0506401_0050.Text: The thing is, I'm a bit insecure about my back.

STDM_0506401_0060.Text: So it's only fair that I warn you...

STDM_0506401_0070.Text: If you see my back, I'll be forced to kill you.

STDM_0506401_0130.Text: What the hell is that? Woah!

STDM_0506401_0140.Text: I'm sorry brother! It wasn't on purpose, I didn't mean to see that!

STDM_0506401_0150.Text: Now I have to kill you!

STDM_0506401_0160.Text: Why don't you just cover it up?

STDM_0506401_0180.Text: Rot Technique, Supreme Art: Wing King.

STDM_0506403_0200.Text: Come on, Kugisaki. Is that the fastest you can run?

STDM_0506403_0250.Text: Okay, we're out of his range.

STDM_0506403_0290.Text: Now, we've reach the time where our technique actually begins.

STDM_0506403_0320.Text: My blood, like that of my brother's, is absorbed by the victims through their wounds and membranes. And then, once any of us brothers activate the Technique, it quickly begins to rot you away from the point of incursion.

STDM_0506403_0330.Text: If the suffering is too great, would you like me to end you right away as a merciful act?

STDM_0506501_0010.Text: Hahahaha. A Technique that guarantees victory once it hits. You two are strong.

STDM_0506501_0020.Text: You're screwed, though. Because that makes me the worst possible match for you.

STDM_0506501_0040.Text: Let's play a game of chicken.

STDM_0506501_0050.Text: Yes, that pain is quite intense, but no matter how many times she does it, it won't end our lives.

STDM_0506501_0060.Text: So, as long as we hold out, you'll be the ones to die.

STDM_0506501_0070.Text: Not to mention, while Decay is active, the pain and poison will keep you from mov—

STDM_0506501_0080.Text: How are you able to move that well?

STDM_0506501_0090.Text: Itadori is the vessel for Ryomen Sukuna, the King of Curses and deadly poisons, so he has resistance to all forms of poison.

STDM_0506501_0100.Text: He's probably feeling pain from the decomposition, but the resulting poison doesn't affect him.

STDM_0506501_0110.Text: And if it's just pain, Yuji Itadori will never stop!

STDM_0506501_0130.Text: He switched! The woman was close to death, so he matched her against my brother, who's also dying.

STDM_0506501_0140.Text: I can't go and save my brother like this. And I can't unleash Wing King while Decay is active.

STDM_0506501_0150.Text: But does that woman have enough strength left to kill my brother?

STDM_0506501_0160.Text: Even with all of her interference, this man won't be able to kill me before she dies.

STDM_0506501_0170.Text: So, I cannot release the Technique.

STDM_0506501_0190.Text: We three are as one. I live for my brothers.

STDM_0506501_0200.Text: I was already releasing it before I even knew it.

STDM_0506503_0220.Text: All right. I haven't shown you this one yet, have I?

STDM_0506503_0250.Text: Why isn't this thing vanishing? Is it still alive? No!

STDM_0506503_0260.Text: It's not a Cursed Spirit! It has a physical body!

STDM_0506503_0270.Text: I'm sorry, elder brother. Even though I was with him, I—

STDM_0506503_0300.Text: I'm sorry Kechizu. I wasn't able to mourn you.

STDM_0506503_0310.Text: But I promise you, I will get revenge for...

STDM_0506503_0340.Text: That woman. What the hell is she doing with my severed arm?

STDM_0506503_0360.Text: So, it wasn't a Technique to turn the Curse on the user.

STDM_0506503_0390.Text: It's creeping me out that you're being so quiet.

STDM_0506503_0400.Text: I was wondering, was this your first time? Killing, instead of exorcising?

STDM_0506503_0410.Text: What just happened meant nothing to me. Just another day for a Sorcerer...

STDM_0506503_0420.Text: If it helps, we didn't have room back there to worry about whether they were Cursed Spirits or Curse users.

STDM_0506503_0430.Text: Yeah, but he was crying. Watching his brother die.

STDM_0506503_0450.Text: In that case, you and I are accomplices.

STDM_0506503_0460.Text: Yuji Itadori and Nobara Kugisaki were attacked by two Special Grade equivalents, and managed to defeat them.

STDM_0506503_0470.Text: They then regrouped with Megumi Fushiguro, who had also survived.

STDM_0506503_0480.Text: Yuji Itadori inadvertently absorbed the finger of Sukuna that Megumi Fushiguro recovered from the Special Grade Cursed Spirit.

STDM_0506503_0490.Text: Examination of the corpses of the two Special Grade equivalents defeated by Yuji Itadori and Nobara Kugisaki revealed that they were fully fleshed Curses made from Death Painting Wombs two and three.

STDM_0506601_0010.Text: Don't talk about them resonating with Itadori.

STDM_0506601_0040.Text: The Curse of Yasohachi Bridge could have started killing at any moment.

STDM_0506601_0050.Text: Besides, when he swallowed that first finger, it was to save me.

STDM_0506601_0060.Text: But there's no way he'd be satisfied with just that.

STDM_0506601_0080.Text: I won't say anything. Girls know how to be discreet.

STDM_0506601_0100.Text: You little punk, other people are going to die because you live.

STDM_0506601_0110.Text: Hey, don't say that to Fushiguro.

STDM_0506601_0120.Text: How are you going to feel when someone you save goes on to kill someone else later?

STDM_0506601_0150.Text: No, none. Everyone's busy, including myself.

STDM_0506601_0160.Text: What now? Should I try inviting the students?

STDM_0506601_0170.Text: Sure, I'm a lightweight so I don't mind if the party's alcohol-free.

STDM_0506601_0180.Text: You can do it. Keep asking around.

STDM_0506601_0190.Text: After all, you never know what might be listening around Utahime.

STDM_0506601_0200.Text: I don't want to think about one of the students being the traitor.

STDM_0506601_0210.Text: It's my conviction that it's the first-grades who should lead the other Sorcerers and the Jujutsu world. Given all the confidential information and the danger...

STDM_0506601_0220.Text: That, along with the pay that they have to accept, is nothing like what those semi-first-grade and below must deal with. So, with that in mind, what are your recommendations?

STDM_0506601_0240.Text: Megumi Fushiguro and Nobara Kugisaki, and then my brother Yuji Itadori. So by my name, Aoi Todo...

STDM_0506601_0260.Text: We hereby recommend these five for promotion to first grade.

STDM_0506601_0261.Text: We hereby recommend these five for promotion to first grade.

STDM_0506601_0270.Text: I just think you're buying way too much stuff.

STDM_0506601_0280.Text: Half of that is yours, isn't it?

STDM_0506601_0290.Text: Huh? No, only one is mine.

STDM_0506601_0300.Text: You drop even one of those bags and I'll kill you.

STDM_0506601_0310.Text: Fushiguro. Yes, yeah. All right, see you.

STDM_0506601_0350.Text: An assignment. He said it was top secret.

STDM_0506601_0360.Text: Well, we just finished doing a big mission for him.

STDM_0506601_0370.Text:
Sounds good to me. Gojo's telling us it's top secret.
It must be big.

STDM_0506601_0400.Text: Yeah, but so what? Let's go.

STDM_0506701_0010.Text: This place is a bit pricey, but it's sooooo highly recommended! Let's go on our next day off.

STDM_0506701_0020.Text: That's what he said anyway, so I'd love to go with you, Maki!

STDM_0506701_0040.Text: But we can't miss a trendy dessert shop. I don't really want to admit it, but maybe we could...shop for clothes too.

STDM_0506701_0050.Text: The only thing you don't want to miss are the desserts you'll stuff yourself with.

STDM_0506701_0060.Text: This is it. It's down a gloomy back alley, but it has a great atmosphere, like only a well-informed few know about it. Let's go right in, Maki!

STDM_0506701_0065.Text: No way. There's sure to be something wrong with a place like this.

STDM_0506701_0070.Text:
What a disappointment! This isn't a stylish shop at all!
I'll buy this.

STDM_0506701_0080.Text: Would Gojo really have come to you just to tell you a store recommendation? Doesn't seem like the kind of thing he'd do.

STDM_0506701_0090.Text: Well, we're here now, and it's fine, right? Maybe he'll try and saddle us with something annoying later, but... Oh, Maki, this'd really suit you!

STDM_0506701_0100.Text: We shouldn't let our guard down...

STDM_0506701_0110.Text: Another haul! Now I'm fine for clothes this season.

STDM_0506701_0120.Text: Nothing happened. I guess I was too suspicious because Satoru is always making mischief.

STDM_0506701_0150.Text:
Huh? You're kidding me!
That blindfolded ass!

STDM_0506702_0173.Text: Don't think I'll let you off easy.

STDM_0506702_0175.Text: If you're not coming, then I am.

STDM_0506703_0190.Text: Dammit. He made us patrol this area on our day off! When we get back, I'm gonna have a few quick words with that blindfolded idiot!

STDM_0506703_0200.Text: It actually is a good shop, so maybe we should just call it evens. Also, you forgot the clothes, Nobara.

STDM_0506703_0210.Text: Oh! I forgot about them. They must be ruined...or not!

STDM_0506703_0240.Text: I'd follow you to the ends of the earth!

STDM_0506801_0030.Text: Jogo, you're such a sore loser.

STDM_0506801_0070.Text: Jogo, Hanami, you have no proof.

STDM_0506801_0080.Text: You're probably hiding something in your body.

STDM_0506802_0113.Text: Knock it off. I told you I'm not cheating.

STDM_0506802_0117.Text: It's not natural that you win so much.

STDM_0506802_0120.Text: I'll be over there. Call me when you're done.

STDM_0506803_0140.Text: So you were hiding cards in your clothes to cheat with.

STDM_0506803_0160.Text: Okay, my bad, I get it. I'll play properly next time.

STDM_0506803_0170.Text: I'd win anyway, even without cheating.

STDM_0506803_0180.Text: Yeah, right. You'll have another trick next time.

STDM_0506901_0010.Text: Oh! Just the guy I wanted to see.

STDM_0506901_0040.Text: You took down a Special Grade the other day.

STDM_0506901_0070.Text: Show me how much stronger you've gotten.

STDM_0506901_0080.Text: Fine with me. I wanted to check my progress anyway.

STDM_0506903_0100.Text: You're stronger, but not by much.

STDM_0506903_0120.Text: That time was special training. Now I'm ready to get serious.

STDM_0506903_0150.Text: I get the feeling you've changed how you fight, Megumi.

STDM_0506903_0160.Text: Could it be that you've learned how to get serious...

STDM_0507001_0030.Text: Weren't you supposed to be exorcising those Cursed Spirits at the mall?

STDM_0507001_0040.Text:
That's nothing to worry about. 
I assigned some trustworthy students to the case.

STDM_0507001_0060.Text: Kento dude, let's do a quiz about Saitama Prefecture.

STDM_0507001_0070.Text: Please stop calling me that. And why do you want to play a quiz game now?

STDM_0507001_0080.Text: I heard from Gojo that you like quizzes about prefectures.

STDM_0507001_0100.Text: Itadori, you should ignore him. He only talks rubbish.

STDM_0507001_0110.Text: Are you trying to imply I'm dishonest?

STDM_0507001_0120.Text: Think back over your actions thus far.

STDM_0507001_0140.Text: I thought it was suspicious, but it looks like there's no finger here.

STDM_0507001_0160.Text: Wait a minute, Nanami, let's leave this to Yuji. We're just here as support.

STDM_0507001_0180.Text: You have to show Nanami how much stronger you've gotten.

STDM_0507001_0190.Text: Don't worry, I'll help you out if things get risky.

STDM_0507001_0200.Text: It's okay. I've gotten way stronger since then.

STDM_0507001_0210.Text: We're keeping our hands in our pockets.

STDM_0507002_0240.Text: He certainly seems to have gained strength.

STDM_0507003_0260.Text: The job's wrapped up, so let's go eat!

STDM_0507003_0280.Text: Why not? It's great to have a drink after work.

STDM_0507003_0300.Text: What do you feel like having, Yuji?

STDM_0507003_0320.Text: All right, leave it to me.

STDM_0607101_0020.Text: Due to persistent bullying by classmates,

STDM_0607101_0030.Text: four male students, including the leader, suffered grave injuries.

STDM_0607101_0040.Text: Three second-grade Sorcerers and one first-grade Sorcerer who went to respond were injured.

STDM_0607101_0050.Text: In accordance with Jujutsu Regulations, a sentence of completely secret execution was handed down.

STDM_0607101_0060.Text: But it was suspended and the offender was handed over to Jujutsu High.

STDM_0607101_0070.Text: Did you hear about the new transfer student coming today? They say he stuffed four of his old classmates in a locker.

STDM_0607101_0110.Text: Well, if he's cocky, I'll put him in his place.

STDM_0607101_0120.Text: Students of all grades, we have a new student! Give him a hand!

STDM_0607101_0130.Text: I heard that the kid's a real wet blanket. The last thing I need is another moody rookie to look after.

STDM_0607101_0170.Text: You can come on in now!

STDM_0607101_0190.Text: Is this some kind of test?

STDM_0607101_0200.Text: Hey. Don't you know that you are cursed?

STDM_0607101_0210.Text: This is a place to learn about Curses. Not a place for the cursed to be hanging around.

STDM_0607101_0220.Text: Oh, you all should back away pretty quickly.

STDM_0607102_0250.Text: I told you to get back.

STDM_0607102_0260.Text: What the hell is going on?

STDM_0607102_0270.Text: Remember, if you attack Yuta, Rika's curse will activate. Or maybe it won't—it's hard to say.

STDM_0607103_0290.Text: So, as you can see, this boy was cursed by his friend Rika, who is still madly in love with him.

STDM_0607103_0300.Text: Be nice to him or else Rika will get you.

STDM_0607103_0310.Text: All right then, our first-year class is a solid four students.

STDM_0607103_0320.Text: For your afternoon Jujutsu practice, you'll be in pairs of two on two.

STDM_0607103_0330.Text: Toge and Panda, you're one pair.

STDM_0607103_0350.Text: Hey, I really hope we can work together.

STDM_0607103_0360.Text: You were bullied, I can totally tell.

STDM_0607103_0380.Text: Maybe it's because you're cursed? It's written on your face that you're trying to come off as a goody two-shoes. It's sickening.

STDM_0607103_0390.Text: Why are you acting like the victim when you're the one being protected?

STDM_0607103_0400.Text: I bet you've been passive your whole life. Believe me, Jujutsu High isn't gonna be that easy.

STDM_0607103_0420.Text: Okay, fine. Get off my case.

STDM_0607103_0430.Text: Sorry about her. She has a bad habit of thinking she's an authority on mind-reading.

STDM_0607201_0020.Text: Two children went missing in succession in an elementary school building.

STDM_0607201_0030.Text: Under the supervision of Special Grade Jujutsu Sorcerer Satoru Gojo, Jujutsu High first-years Maki Zen'in and Yuta Okkotsu were dispatched in order to gain practical experience.

STDM_0607201_0040.Text: Transfer student. Don't let yourself get distracted.

STDM_0607202_0060.Text: Just remember this, the weaker Curses are, the more they group together.

STDM_0607202_0070.Text: Okay, let's get a move on.

STDM_0607203_0100.Text: There aren't many Curses here, even though the Veil's been drawn... No, they are here, they're just not attacking.

STDM_0607203_0110.Text: I wonder, is it because he's here?

STDM_0607203_0130.Text: Thank, thank, thank you for the meal!

STDM_0607203_0140.Text: Shit. I dropped my Cursed Tool!

STDM_0607203_0170.Text: We're stuck in this dumb Curse's stomach.

STDM_0607203_0180.Text: You mean that Curse ate us?!

STDM_0607203_0200.Text: Please help me, my friend's about to die.

STDM_0607203_0220.Text: Just barely. Look at them closer.

STDM_0607203_0230.Text: The big one's obviously been affected by the Curse too. Both of them could die at any minute.

STDM_0607203_0240.Text: Oh, no... What do we do?!

STDM_0607203_0250.Text: I told you, all we can do is wait for help. Not everyone's like you. Most people don't have resistance to Curses.

STDM_0607203_0270.Text: Is she going to die? Please, I don't want to die too.

STDM_0607203_0280.Text: I don't know how to save you. I'm sorry.

STDM_0607203_0290.Text: Okkotsu! Tell me, why did you come to Jujutsu High?

STDM_0607203_0300.Text: What is it you wanna do? What do you want? What're your goals? What are you trying to achieve?

STDM_0607203_0310.Text: I just don't wanna see anyone getting hurt again. I tried to lock myself away, and disappear.

STDM_0607203_0320.Text: But Gojo warned me I'd be too lonely. And I couldn't argue with him.

STDM_0607203_0330.Text: I don't want to be all alone. I want to be needed by someone. I want it to be all right to know that I'm alive.

STDM_0607203_0350.Text: Keep exorcising Curses over and over again. And when you get good at it, confidence and friends will find you.

STDM_0607203_0360.Text: That's why we're here, at Jujutsu High.

STDM_0607203_0400.Text: 2017, Tokyo. The Special Grade Cursed Apparition Rika Orimoto was fully manifested for 422 seconds.

STDM_0607203_0440.Text: All right, it's just a little further everybody.

STDM_0607203_0450.Text: I need to get Miss Zen'in and these kids to Gojo.

STDM_0607203_0460.Text: Hopefully, Rika keeps those Curses distracted.

STDM_0607203_0500.Text: I'm not gonna be weak anymore! I'm gonna change. Here and now!

STDM_0607301_0010.Text: Were children reported missing at this school too?

STDM_0607301_0030.Text: Ah, I see. It's easy for Curses to manifest in elementary schools, so they probably just want us to clean up as a precaution.

STDM_0607301_0050.Text: Well, if nothing happened here, then I guess we got an easier job than Maki and Yuta.

STDM_0607303_0090.Text: By the way, Toge, something worrying you about the transfer student?

STDM_0607303_0110.Text: I get it. He doesn't seem to know how he ended up getting cursed.

STDM_0607303_0120.Text: That's kind of worrying for us as his seniors. Well, we're in the same year, but you know.

STDM_0607303_0130.Text: I wonder if those two are working together on their mission.

STDM_0607303_0140.Text: Maki was going a little hard on him, don't you think?

STDM_0607303_0160.Text: Yeah, you're right. If anything happens, Satoru will just... On second thought, I don't think we can count on him.

STDM_0607303_0180.Text: Well, there's no doubting his strength, at least. If worst comes to worst, he'll be able to handle it.

STDM_0607401_0010.Text: They say both Maki and the kids are going to be fine.

STDM_0607401_0030.Text: Funny, you don't look very relieved to me.

STDM_0607401_0040.Text: I did it. I managed to call Rika out by myself.

STDM_0607401_0050.Text: Oh, really? That's a big step forward.

STDM_0607401_0070.Text: I'm starting to think Rika didn't curse me after all. I think I might have been the one who cursed Rika.

STDM_0607401_0080.Text: You very well may be right.

STDM_0607401_0090.Text: There's no curse more twisted than love.

STDM_0607401_0100.Text: All right, while I'm at Jujutsu High...

STDM_0607401_0110.Text: There's something I want to learn. I want to break Rika's curse.

STDM_0607401_0140.Text: We entrusted you with Yuta Okkotsu precisely so we could prevent this sort of thing.

STDM_0607401_0150.Text: There's no room for excuses, Gojo.

STDM_0607401_0160.Text: Well, that's good, because I don't have any excuses.

STDM_0607401_0170.Text: How can you joke about this? If Rika Orimoto had remained out of control, she could have wiped out an entire town.

STDM_0607401_0180.Text: If she had I would have risked my life to stop her.

STDM_0607401_0190.Text: Listen, now that we've seen it, there's only one thing we can say about that Curse.

STDM_0607401_0200.Text: And that's "I don't understand." We can't control something that we don't understand. Leave it alone for a while, see how it works out.

STDM_0607401_0210.Text: Do not forget, Yuta Okkotsu's execution has only been temporarily suspended.

STDM_0607401_0220.Text: And don't you forget that if it comes down to that decision, I'll side with Yuta Okkotsu.

STDM_0607401_0230.Text: It's nearly impossible to exorcise a Curse as big as Rika Orimoto.

STDM_0607401_0240.Text: However, breaking the curse is a different story.

STDM_0607401_0250.Text: You have to identify thousands of knots of Cursed Energy, and unravel them one by one.

STDM_0607401_0260.Text: It's a method that can only be pursued by you, the person that she's cursed.

STDM_0607401_0270.Text: What exactly am I supposed to do?

STDM_0607401_0300.Text: You see, Curses are most stable when they're possessing an object.

STDM_0607401_0310.Text: So now you need to borrow part of Rika's curse, imbue it into the katana, and control it.

STDM_0607401_0320.Text: Increase the amount as you repeat it, and eventually you'll have the whole Curse under your control.

STDM_0607401_0330.Text: Once you do that, then you're free. Both you and her.

STDM_0607401_0340.Text: Imbue the Curse into the katana...

STDM_0607401_0350.Text: But that's not all. You also have to learn how to wield a blade. Until you can combine those two skills, you'll still be weak. So the first thing we're gonna do is to get you training.

STDM_0607401_0370.Text: Let's just get right into it!

STDM_0607501_0010.Text: Think you've got the hang of imbuing the Curse into your blade yet?

STDM_0607501_0030.Text: Good. So let's finish the warm-up, and then—

STDM_0607501_0040.Text: What? That wasn't a real fight?

STDM_0607501_0060.Text: So you want me to take part in special training?

STDM_0607501_0070.Text: Yep. I want to see how Yuta fares against a hard-hitter.

STDM_0607501_0080.Text: It'd be great if you could get used to wielding the blade, but just try your best not to get overpowered by his raw strength.

STDM_0607503_0100.Text: Well, pretty good for your first time.

STDM_0607503_0120.Text: You just have to learn how to go for it. You have a habit of holding yourself back.

STDM_0607503_0130.Text: True. And it doesn't mean rushing in carelessly. Once you can make quicker decisions and draw on your determination at will, you'll improve a lot.

STDM_0607601_0010.Text: In celebration of Maki's recovery, I'd like to hold a two-on-two tournament today!

STDM_0607601_0020.Text: Can you call it a tournament when there are only two teams?

STDM_0607601_0030.Text: Yeah. All right, now. Pair up, guys. Whoever's left gets paired with me.

STDM_0607601_0040.Text: Thank goodness. I can team up with Gojo.

STDM_0607601_0070.Text: And now, to announce the teams!

STDM_0607601_0080.Text: Again? Seriously? This has got to be rigged.

STDM_0607601_0090.Text: Toge and Panda vs. Maki and Yuta! By a lucky coincidence, they're the same groups as last time!

STDM_0607601_0100.Text: Well there aren't that many combinations we can make.

STDM_0607601_0110.Text: Zen—I mean, Maki. Let's go for it together.

STDM_0607601_0120.Text: Don't drag me down, okay? Put in some effort!

STDM_0607601_0140.Text: Time to get pumped! Keep it above board! Fight!

STDM_0607603_0150.Text: I haven't gone all out like this in a long time, so I'm not in the best condition.

STDM_0607701_0030.Text: Don't just stand there, take your stance. Idiot.

STDM_0607701_0040.Text: Are you gonna land a blow sometime today?

STDM_0607702_0055.Text: Don't think I'll let you off easy.

STDM_0607702_0060.Text: You should always treat training like it's a real battle.

STDM_0607702_0070.Text: Both experiencing pain and avoiding pain makes a huge difference in how fast you grow.

STDM_0607703_0080.Text: It's been three months since Yuta came to Jujutsu High.

STDM_0607703_0100.Text: And Maki looks like she's having more fun too. I don't think she gotten to spar very often with other weapo—

STDM_0607703_0140.Text: What do you like better—big or small boobs?

STDM_0607703_0160.Text: To tell you the truth, I've never given it much thought before. I guess given the choice I like them somewhat big?

STDM_0607703_0200.Text: Oh, that's it. I'm gonna kill you.

STDM_0607703_0250.Text: I still don't understand anything Inumaki says. Which makes me a little scared of him.

STDM_0607703_0270.Text: You two, continue training or whatever it is you're doing.

STDM_0607703_0280.Text: Toge, you've been requested for a Curse that you're perfect for. Shouldn't take you too long to exorcise it.

STDM_0607703_0300.Text: Yuta, why don't you go along too? You'll be Toge's support.

STDM_0607703_0310.Text: Huh? You want me to support him?

STDM_0607703_0320.Text: Well, you'll be more like an observer, really.

STDM_0607703_0330.Text: There's a wide variety of Jujutsu, so you can assume there are as many ways to exorcise a Curse as there are Sorcerers.

STDM_0607703_0340.Text: Toge's Cursed Speech is a good example of one way. Make sure to learn from him.

STDM_0607703_0350.Text: To break a Curse, you must first understand Curses.

STDM_0607801_0020.Text: Jujutsu High first-year Toge Inumaki was dispatched to a shopping center where a group of low-grade Cursed Spirits were found during an inspection.

STDM_0607801_0030.Text: His classmate Yuta Okkotsu was sent with him to assist, on the conditions that he would only use the power contained in the katana,

STDM_0607801_0040.Text: and that he would not let out Special Grade Cursed Apparition, Rika Orimoto.

STDM_0607801_0050.Text: Although Toge Inumaki exorcised the low-grade Cursed Spirits,

STDM_0607801_0060.Text: he encountered an unconfirmed semi-first-grade Cursed Spirit not mentioned in the report.

STDM_0607801_0090.Text: You want to fight this battle by yourself?

STDM_0607801_0110.Text: Thanks, Inumaki. But, I'm going to come with you.

STDM_0607802_0150.Text: Hey, what's it mad at me for?

STDM_0607802_0160.Text: Inumaki has an incredibly kind heart.

STDM_0607802_0170.Text: He doesn't want to accidentally curse others,

STDM_0607802_0180.Text: so he speaks in rice ball ingredients—words that can't carry Curses.

STDM_0607802_0200.Text: He tried to keep me away from danger.

STDM_0607802_0210.Text: Earlier, when I was totally freaking out, he was trying to make me feel comfortable.

STDM_0607802_0220.Text: Okay, maybe I can't compete with this Curse.

STDM_0607802_0240.Text: I'm not gonna let Inumaki's kindness go to waste.

STDM_0607803_0290.Text: Once I break Rika's curse, I'm gonna be a normal person again.

STDM_0607803_0300.Text: I won't be able to stay at Jujutsu High anymore, but until then, I'm gonna try to help as many people as I can.

STDM_0607803_0310.Text: Three types of Residuals were discovered upon inspection of the scene.

STDM_0607803_0320.Text: According to Special Grade Sorcerer Satoru Gojo, one of the types belonged to Suguru Geto, a fugitive Curse user who was sentenced to death.

STDM_0607803_0330.Text: Meanwhile, an unknown suspect covered supervisor Kiyotaka Ijichi's Veil with their own.

STDM_0607803_0340.Text: Investigations continued in order to establish whether Suguru Geto had been involved.

STDM_0607901_0010.Text: All right, today's combat training is in pairs again.

STDM_0607901_0020.Text: Yuta and Toge learned a lot on the shopping center mission the other day, so I'd like them to show that to Maki and Panda.

STDM_0607901_0030.Text: Still, I doubt we're going to lose to them.

STDM_0607901_0040.Text: Yuta, I heard you barely made a scratch with that blade of yours.

STDM_0607901_0070.Text: You got careless and Yuta ended up saving your ass?

STDM_0607901_0090.Text:
We'll whip you into shape.
Come on, Panda.

STDM_0607901_0100.Text: You're savage, Maki. Guess I've got to match your energy. Bring it on!

STDM_0607903_0120.Text: It wasn't as one-sided as before, but I'm still no match for either of you two.

STDM_0607903_0130.Text: You can train a hundred years and you still won't be able to beat me in close combat.

STDM_0607903_0140.Text: You may not be able to beat us yet, but you have unique capabilities. You should develop those.

STDM_0607903_0160.Text: You're still a weakling now, though. Get ready for another round.

STDM_0608001_0020.Text: Suguru Geto infiltrated the circle at the front of the premises alongside fellow Curse users and Cursed Spirits.

STDM_0608001_0030.Text: First-year students Maki Zen'in, Toge Inumaki, Panda, and Yuta Okkotsu were on the scene. Suguru Geto initiated contact with Yuta Okkotsu.

STDM_0608001_0040.Text: Principal Masamichi Yaga summoned Special Grade Sorcerer Satoru Gojo and all Sorcerers semi-first-grade and above to the scene.

STDM_0608001_0050.Text: However, Suguru Geto and his allies escaped by releasing several Cursed Spirits. Before leaving, he made a declaration of war.

STDM_0608001_0070.Text: On December 24th, when the sun sets, we shall begin the Night Parade of a Hundred Demons.

STDM_0608001_0080.Text: At the crucible of Curses: Shinjuku, Tokyo, as well as the holy land of Jujutsu: Kyoto.

STDM_0608001_0090.Text: A thousand Curses will be unleashed upon each place.

STDM_0608001_0110.Text: If you wish to avoid a scene straight from hell, come do your best to stop it.

STDM_0608001_0120.Text: Let us freely curse each other to the death.

STDM_0608001_0150.Text:
I heard this new first-year class is simply outstanding. Seems it's true.
You still have an eye for talent.

STDM_0608001_0160.Text: Please excuse me. I must be on my way.

STDM_0608001_0170.Text: You didn't think we'd just let you leave?

STDM_0608001_0190.Text: Your precious students are well within my range.

STDM_0608001_0200.Text: Goodbye everybody. See you at the war.

STDM_0608101_0020.Text: Survival of the weakest. That's the proper form society should take.

STDM_0608101_0030.Text: Help the weak, and discourage the strong. Listen, Satoru.

STDM_0608101_0070.Text: Do you think that you're the strongest because you're Satoru Gojo? Or are you Satoru Gojo because you are the strongest?

STDM_0608101_0080.Text: What exactly are you trying to say?

STDM_0608101_0090.Text: If I could switch places with you, then wouldn't my foolish ideals become reasonable possibilities?

STDM_0608101_0110.Text: And I plan on following it to the best of my ability.

STDM_0608103_0140.Text: December 24. Day of the Night Parade of a Hundred Demons.

STDM_0608103_0160.Text: I will kill Yuta Okkotsu and obtain the Special Grade Cursed Apparition, Rika Orimoto.

STDM_0608103_0170.Text: The aim of the Night Parade of a Hundred Demons is to get Okkotsu alone and unprotected.

STDM_0608103_0180.Text: Now, let's raise the curtain on a new age.

STDM_0608201_0010.Text: Well, I guess...something crazy is going down.

STDM_0608201_0030.Text: What are you doing here? Classes are canceled for the week.

STDM_0608201_0040.Text: Well, I was just feeling kinda restless. Doesn't seem like anyone's around in the dorms either.

STDM_0608201_0050.Text: Toge's in Shinjuku with some others as backup. And since the principal likes Panda so much, he's probably with Toge too.

STDM_0608201_0120.Text: I know you want to ask, about why Geto said I was a failure.

STDM_0608201_0140.Text: My family is the Zen'in clan. One of the three major families of elite Jujutsu Sorcerers.

STDM_0608201_0150.Text: But I can't see Curses without the help of these lame glasses.

STDM_0608201_0160.Text: So then, why are you still a Jujutsu Sorcerer?

STDM_0608201_0170.Text: Because I happen to be spiteful. I plan on returning to my family one day as a Grade 1 Sorcerer. And then I'll obliterate the Zen'in clan from within.

STDM_0608201_0180.Text: I was just thinking, that's so like you.

STDM_0608201_0190.Text: I wish... I wish I could be just like you.

STDM_0608201_0210.Text: If there's ever anything I can help you with, just ask me. You know, like, obliterating your clan, or something.

STDM_0608201_0220.Text: You moron. There's no point if I don't do it by myself.

STDM_0608201_0230.Text: I'm going back to my room.

STDM_0608201_0250.Text: Come on, Maki, don't be an idiot.

STDM_0608201_0260.Text: Don't start believing that you've really been accepted.

STDM_0608201_0270.Text: Emerge from darkness blacker still. Purify that which is impure.

STDM_0608201_0280.Text: A Veil's being drawn over the school? But by who and why?

STDM_0608201_0300.Text: A Veil was drawn over the Jujutsu High school building while first-years Maki Zen'in and Yuta Okkotsu were inside.

STDM_0608201_0310.Text:
Maki Zen'in went outside the building and came into contact with Suguru Geto. 
A battle ensued.

STDM_0608202_0330.Text: Is it a problem? I think the real question is, what are you doing here?

STDM_0608202_0340.Text: Sorry about this, but I don't have time to chat with monkeys.

STDM_0608301_0020.Text: I have a report! ...What's the matter?

STDM_0608301_0030.Text: Oh. ...That guy loves to show off, and yet he's not on the front lines? Is he in Kyoto?

STDM_0608301_0040.Text: We should have received some kind of word if he was.

STDM_0608301_0050.Text: Just lost in thought, what's up?

STDM_0608301_0060.Text: I know this isn't really the best time, but I thought you should know.

STDM_0608301_0070.Text: It's about the investigation into Yuta that you requested earlier.

STDM_0608301_0100.Text: I'm sending both of you to Jujutsu High right now!

STDM_0608301_0110.Text:
Geto is there. He has to be. 
I'm absolutely certain of it. Probably. If my intuition is right, Yuta and Maki might both die.

STDM_0608301_0120.Text: I'll join you after I take care of that foreign Sorcerer. Protect the two of them. Defend them with your lives.

STDM_0608301_0160.Text: Special Grade Sorcerer Satoru Gojo used a Cursed Technique to send Jujutsu High first-years Toge Inumaki and Panda from Shinjuku to Jujutsu High.

STDM_0608301_0170.Text: They entered the grounds by breaking part of the Veil drawn by Curse user Suguru Geto, and engaged him in combat.

STDM_0608301_0180.Text: Did they break through the walls to take the shortest route to me?

STDM_0608303_0220.Text: Good. Come on, let's check on Maki.

STDM_0608401_0020.Text: I'm so incredibly touched right now.

STDM_0608401_0030.Text: You all raced down here to save Yuta Okkotsu.

STDM_0608401_0040.Text:
Jujutsu Sorcerers sacrificing themselves for a colleague. 
Such affection. Such admiration.

STDM_0608401_0050.Text: This is the world I long for, all here right before my very eyes!

STDM_0608401_0090.Text: The Special Grade Cursed Apparition Rika Orimoto fully manifested a second time.

STDM_0608403_0140.Text: These three are horribly wounded, especially Maki.

STDM_0608403_0160.Text: Not fair, not fair, not fair. It's always you! It was always you!

STDM_0608403_0180.Text: That's the woman who saved my life.

STDM_0608403_0190.Text: Handle her with more care than you would a butterfly or a flower.

STDM_0608403_0200.Text:
I'm sorry, Yuta, I'm sorry.
Please don't be mad.

STDM_0608403_0220.Text: Our enemy is that man there.

STDM_0608403_0250.Text: Then I will hate him, too.

STDM_0608501_0020.Text: Shall we pick up where we left off?

STDM_0608501_0060.Text:
That really is hard to use.
The Cursed Energy scatters, and it's hard to focus it.

STDM_0608501_0080.Text: I see now. Rika Orimoto's true form, it's ever-changing. She's a bastion of Cursed Energy.

STDM_0608501_0090.Text:
It's true, all my friends are so amazing and strong.
And you Rika, you are, too.

STDM_0608501_0100.Text: Sorry, but I need her more than you do.

STDM_0608501_0110.Text: I'll beat you to a pulp!

STDM_0608502_0130.Text: The riff-raff are no longer a match for you. So I'll have to crush you myself.

STDM_0608502_0140.Text: Mankind stands at the top of the food chain, yet they imagined the existence of higher beings and called them gods.

STDM_0608502_0150.Text: Don't you find that awfully strange?

STDM_0608502_0160.Text: Especially since Jujutsu Sorcerers exist without belief.

STDM_0608502_0170.Text: In the end, all those monkeys just want to avert their eyes from the existence of those better than them.

STDM_0608502_0180.Text: Are you saying you wanna be a god? That's something a child would say!

STDM_0608502_0200.Text: What I long for isn't any kind of enlightenment. It's a chosen people.

STDM_0608503_0230.Text: I don't know about any sorcerers outside of this school.

STDM_0608503_0240.Text: So I don't know if you're right or wrong.

STDM_0608503_0250.Text: But I do know one thing. I know that in order to remain here with my friends...

STDM_0608503_0260.Text: and in order to believe it's okay that I'm still alive.

STDM_0608503_0270.Text: I know what I have to do. I have to do it. I have no choice but to kill you.

STDM_0608503_0280.Text: I'm going to use my full force to kill you now. No more time for compromise.

STDM_0608503_0320.Text: I'll combine the 4,461 Curses I possess into one, and strike you with it.

STDM_0608503_0330.Text: Cursed Spirit Manipulation, Supreme Art: Maelstrom.

STDM_0608503_0340.Text: Okkotsu, I'm so happy. My timing was perfect because I came to kill you before you could fully unleash Rika Orimoto.

STDM_0608503_0370.Text: Thank you for always protecting me. Thank you for falling in love with me.

STDM_0608503_0380.Text: Just one last time, please, lend me your power.

STDM_0608503_0390.Text: I have to stop him. I won't need anything else from you after that.

STDM_0608503_0400.Text: I'll give you my future, my heart, my body. I'll give you everything.

STDM_0608503_0410.Text: From now on, we'll truly be together forever.

STDM_0608503_0420.Text: I love you, Rika. Let's die together.

STDM_0608503_0440.Text: Yuta! Yuta! I love you, I love you!

STDM_0608503_0445.Text: Is he offering himself as a sacrifice to release the limit on her cursed energy?

STDM_0608503_0450.Text: I never realized you were such a womanizer.

STDM_0608503_0460.Text: Don't be rude. Our love is pure.

STDM_0608503_0470.Text: Fine, you fight for love. I'll fight to win.

STDM_0608601_0010.Text: You're late again as usual, Satoru.

STDM_0608601_0020.Text: You sent the Panda and the Cursed Speech user assuming that I'd defeat them, didn't you? To set Okkotsu off.

STDM_0608601_0040.Text: Trusted that a man as principled as you wouldn't kill off young Sorcerers without a reason.

STDM_0608601_0050.Text: You want to talk about trust?

STDM_0608601_0060.Text: I didn't think I had any of that left in me, after everything I've been through.

STDM_0608601_0070.Text: Tell me, do you have any last words?

STDM_0608601_0080.Text: No matter what anyone tells you, I hate those monkeys.

STDM_0608601_0090.Text: But, I never held any hatred for those in Jujutsu High School.

STDM_0608601_0100.Text: I just couldn't wear a heartfelt smile while living in this world.

STDM_0608601_0140.Text: The least you could do is hit me with some Curses.

STDM_0608601_0170.Text: Come on and wake up, Yuta.

STDM_0608601_0200.Text: Maki, you're okay? Inumaki... Whoa, Panda, your arm hasn't healed!

STDM_0608601_0210.Text: Chill out, dude. We're all doing way better than you are right now.

STDM_0608601_0220.Text: By the way, thanks for saving us, Yuta.

STDM_0608601_0260.Text: Sorry about that, Rika. I didn't mean to keep you waiting.

STDM_0608601_0280.Text: Congratulations. You managed to break the curse.

STDM_0608601_0290.Text: You were right the whole time, Yuta.

STDM_0608601_0300.Text:
Rika didn't place a curse on you.
You placed a curse on Rika.

STDM_0608601_0310.Text: That's right. At the time, I refused to accept Rika's death.

STDM_0608601_0320.Text: ...It was all my fault, wasn't it?

STDM_0608601_0330.Text: I turned you into that form. I hurt all those people.

STDM_0608601_0340.Text: It's all... It's all my fault.

STDM_0608601_0360.Text: During the six years I was cursed, I've been happier than I ever was before.

STDM_0608601_0380.Text: And don't cross to my side anytime soon, okay?

STDM_0608601_0410.Text: It's a bit late to tell you, but you weren't at fault for the incident with Geto. He would've attacked Jujutsu High School whether you were here or not.

STDM_0608601_0440.Text: Oh, my student ID. Thanks for finding it for me, Gojo.

STDM_0608601_0460.Text: My best friend found it. My only friend really.

STDM_0608601_0470.Text: Come on, Yuta! How long are you gonna keep us waiting?!

STDM_0608701_0010.Text: You may have broken Rika's Curse, but we've still got to make you into a strong Jujutsu Sorcerer.

STDM_0608701_0020.Text: First, let me see what you're capable of now.

STDM_0608702_0050.Text: My dear students are counting on me, so I suppose I'll need to work hard.

STDM_0608703_0060.Text: Good. You've gotten better at handling your weapon, and it looks like your decision-making is improving, too.

STDM_0608703_0070.Text: I'll have a request for you pretty soon.

STDM_0608703_0090.Text:
An overseas business trip!
And you'd better not forget to get me a souvenir!
